name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: My thoughts for educators and staff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://larrysylvester.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=92bf0220b7c9b43b02ebf051f&id=321a5144ed&e=a5c6b39366)
---
| By now, most of you are aware of this year’s school board race and my candidacy to fill this seat. Had you asked me twenty years ago to run for office, I’d have passed for a whole list of reasons, but I am old enough to know - never say never. As you know, this position will be formulating policy that will impact our classrooms over the next six years. My intentions are not to brag on my experience that makes me qualified, but to communicate why I feel compelled to fill this seat and what I bring to the table to help take DCS to the next level.
For those that don’t know me well, I am 59 years old and was born in Laurel Mississippi. I didn’t go directly to college after high school. I was a CDL driver for an oil drilling company in south Mississippi. It didn’t take long until I realized that I wanted something different for my life and enrolled in Jones County Jr. College in Ellisville, MS. It was here I earned my A.A., then transferred to Ole Miss where I earned my B.A. in biology, M.S. in biology and M.Ed. in educational leadership. While at Ole Miss, I got really lucky and met my wife of 32 years. Pat and I started our family of two children, and I began my teaching career for Oxford City Schools and the Department of Biology at Ole Miss.
Having a desire to learn more and further my education, I enrolled at University of Memphis for their doctorate program. While there, I served as the Leadership Evaluator of Assistant Principals. My family and I then moved to DeSoto County while completing my doctoral degree in educational leadership. After my PhD, I was a professor at St. Joseph School of Nursing and a professor of biology at NWCC – DeSoto Center – where I retired after 25 years. About fifteen years ago, I began working as an Adjunct Professor for Belhaven University’s Graduate School of Education where I currently teach graduate courses.
I am proud to have served in various leadership positions while at Northwest Mississippi Community College. This included Dean of the Evening College, Chair of Natural Science, Chair of the SACS Natural Science Review Committee, and Member of the SACS Substantive Change Committee. I was elected by my peers as the President of the Faculty Senate for ten consecutive years and also elected President of the State Faculty Senate.
I believe the Administration exist to support the faculty and the faculty and staff exist to support the students – some of which are their own. Many of our faculty have student children and know the struggles of teaching their classroom children and their own. I was there not too long ago, and I know the support you need to be your best.
I don’t believe in helping one group at the expense of another. Instead, I’ve always believed we should help all individuals and give back to our communities. That is why I have served on the boards of the March of Dimes, American Heart Association, Life Blood, and currently serve as the Vice President of the Board of Directors for Disability Rights Mississippi – the enforcement wing of the ADA in Mississippi.
My years teaching traditional, hybrid, and online courses affords me the ability to understand the new and burdensome tasks we face during the most challenging times of our careers. In fact, my dissertation compared the success rates between online, hybrid and traditional instruction, how to navigate through alternate learning platforms that are necessary for our children to reach their full potential and give our teachers the right tools to do their jobs with minimal frustration.
That’s a long way of saying, I’m not seeking this position for the whopping pay of $67.00 a meeting or to climb the political ladder. I am running because I truly believe I have a skill set that I hope to parlay into something useful on our school board for both the students and faculty. Which, in my opinion, would be the best thing I could hope to do for my community.
Thank you for taking time to read my letter and your consideration when you cast your ballot this November. If there is ever anything I can do for you, please do not hesitate to reach out to me.
Best personal regards, Dr. Larry Sylvester
---
|

Trever

clean_body: Trever Nehls Needs Your Support | | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Election day is less than eight days away. The race for Fort Bend County Sheriff could come down to a few thousand votes or less. I Love Fort Bend County. Our county offers countless opportunities to achieve your dreams, expand your knowledge, and contribute to humanity. I will work tirelessly for you. I need your help to make one final push. Thank you for your support, Trever | | | | Here is how you can help | | | Will help us inform our supporters of exactly where, when, and how to vote. The Sheriff's Race is way down on the ballot. | | | Will help us run a joint campaign with Troy, that reminds voters to “Vote Nehls Twice” | | | Will help us run a campaign to target registered voters who have yet to vote. | | | Will help us run ad campaigns to spread the word to a larger audience. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Copyright © 2020 , All rights reserved.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is officially fewer than 10 days away, and, because of your hard work, we are in a great position to win this race! We are now in the final stretch of early voting, and if you haven't done so already, please go vote as soon as possible! Make your voice heard and help us bring new leadership to the 7th District by casting your vote early.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lkPaBZz-ZBZZLwO0fQV-v6Hv2KCS7gdRvdttbs7Puhx2Tb5b4o_FA_9I0w-My4H5ayIvT7EyNRAtrjWPZdfxbcBRi04jsw0PFOociWzZKH33sMI39YGfarCHSzeYms93AMbJEl9O07Yr9mX2q-hDtRvTubjDMLgq4EQvIZLLeYDYrhmRfAaIQNUVI22l6GDbJYCH5HM-ZR0oFI7LRtZeq7cR-CSz4rvG5EKOpjlWQB1wMCN3FbjSbK4PjcBmj8_4hT5K3Itf6OUoEqEtss4rwYQ3t41AFXSfLsFDMBFtQms_)

This Wednesday, I had the honor of joining Hugh Hewitt to discuss the opportunities facing Texas' 7th District and the type of leadership necessary to propel us forward. Now more than ever, Houston needs an advocate who will fight for our interests in Washington. As your next Congressman, I will protect our energy workers, increase the affordability of our healthcare, and ensure Houston's voice is heard in DC. You can catch the full interview [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lkPaBZz-ZBZZLwO0fQV-v6Hv2KCS7gdRvdttbs7Puhx2Z5pM2CyV5zPOda33N8Q-6Z6F2HlQj0x1u6iYLJ2AJpokAsAk5hiRQ2VRtmP0hfmJl8MOnDnMueLKZG2nbaxaT_xIHGNumqxaIJAEJTwugCidzeE8tzXT1nSNbYQh5wtlfCIQoNJwvSGjJLTZjEU38zo1ZR1OdNMEP3DX8aZqK8irtaMTbYbGSsnBcXGlabPTJKtmPh7TyNTJZIQORi2oOTDjeCiT9SKGcVgGCYPusuLm4s3Q83m4G2Fyp9XAN4f_):

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lkPaBZz-ZBZZLwO0fQV-v6Hv2KCS7gdRvdttbs7Puhx2Z5pM2CyV5zPOda33N8Q-6Z6F2HlQj0x1u6iYLJ2AJpqh_T-wI58GBK2Sw-ALSgrtZSgwBYocojZLoiQUo2skhY64UcUlbzLMLUpRWrwqdMi36wDEDcpc38FZupIxz51xCD_Rnf8ukEun1EboiwXi8QHoX1PA9DtRss-noZrNs8O5simg2TQEbSCDbDD0poXaRwOzOzkkyV5dupv1XDjmFSrY8GniZL2BKDgaxEMVFllBL87PKCvj7IQtapM4Y6Ff)

On Wednesday, my wife Emily and I went to the polls early to cast our votes. It was incredible to participate in this great American tradition with my two baby daughters. My daughters are a cornerstone of my commitment to preserve our way of life and the American Dream. I want to ensure that the opportunities and values that shaped my life exist for my daughters' generation, and that we can build on the great progress we have made to create an ever brighter future for generations to come.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lkPaBZz-ZBZZLwO0fQV-v6Hv2KCS7gdRvdttbs7Puhx2YGJjUvz7gsp_hL_yeP8KTh-2FflhIrUFckCwq-TgKgRH3lKKtXXSZdMNEXP7IKXqSNhATic0oPZDRpVZ_xBQOBCkRAlNnoK2Bub5IXdEAllNX2XIvz1d8S8A733eiSaqIQ62DOPIfntMVsgFjAbqehuhBNfBa2HsqzcoZp3NWmt9WDHN_i9V_wtm79qvt62MUPzhvxNZcaXPQIY0AO9NtYSUNUd3xI-Xl8KohzJk5fRfk2QCU3wmnBjp18sh_7eQ)

On Friday, I was honored to participate in an open, non-partisan candidate forum hosted by the Mayors of the Memorial Villages. While I am disappointed that my opponent refused to attend, I am glad to have had the opportunity to answer questions from so many members of our community. Forums like the one hosted this Friday are valuable components of our democratic system and I enjoyed engaging with folks from our community and delving into the issues they care about.

In case you missed it, this Thursday Vice President Biden made clear his plans to end the oil and gas industry if he is elected President. As we all know, this would be catastrophic for the 7th District, bringing unprecedented levels of job loss and economic hardship to our city. The 7th District needs an advocate in Washington who will stand between Houston and these destructive policies. Unfortunately, my opponent has demonstrated she is not up to the task. As your Congressman, I will always fight to defend the Houstonians who have made our city the energy capital of the world.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lkPaBZz-ZBZZLwO0fQV-v6Hv2KCS7gdRvdttbs7Puhx2KeGoElMAf7gkB8nw7cxQrWjvpejyT1PxVS3CEpSHBJe5FyJoNx5UypC_it80jxMhb8HZMtJJtLJkK44adXS03PixIlnhJujMcBZ3N1cQKa7fM0KfQ_46uc-1afj2NfUFif6u6Jo9d0qG9_zcCipmlFupRbwHcVUzqxV54L_H8OFhscNwYMSHUk2A8Foj3JjqhKqhmqi1gcnWDbB0Idbjsm1ZExaryWU5IEDVZ7tXYUh6nlie8pDE5UWK0MEPKr8o)

I am so appreciative of the many members of Team Hunt who have helped us get to this point. Thanks to your support, we are in an excellent position to succeed on November 3rd. If you'd like to find new ways to support our campaign or would like to request a yard sign, please contact us at info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bffcc693267d43aaafcad4630cb6133e&_e=lI_f1tAkYM9vUBdGrbM2lvnAhU8iotA7VJkAC_DR43allgIb1cscfgOxL87W-kNOcYOjMXuvSHCnWSGigmmEQDcHpWtF-Ixi6peHAJKH1AXxQCIi9O3VP3ewMXcuKY6cQirBFuhjHcj-74B_C0NIcV_0MF3_m36gduwhzBbP-kvzkd4Gw_nV_WNvE0wO1vgRl4j0Gpo9Dq-UMQAUawrAqMu9V2ZbO9kOvYjhYQsEGF_1IxokChVG7AlDoyLo90fboPXI8gYptGjC5EBpOS4g51t3VyL5LesdeeA95xjjvFY%3D)****

name: Cory Booker
subject: Hear me out, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
My friend Senator Durbin said I could reach out to you today because we're in the fight of our lives to take back the Senate -- we only have 9 days left and the stakes could not be higher.
**Before I ask if you can chip in to help flip the Senate, I hope you'll hear me out.**
We as a country find ourselves in a moral moment. President Trump and Vice President Pence have spread chaos, hatred, and division across our country, all while failing to properly address the COVID-19 pandemic. Everything from health care coverage for millions of people, to reproductive freedom guaranteed by Roe v. Wade, to our bedrock environmental protections, to our most basic right to vote, and so much more are on the line.
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have been saying, "This is a battle for the soul of our nation." And they're right. But defeating President Trump is not enough -- **_we need to flip the Senate, too._**
**[Will you split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Dick Durbin right now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201025-cory-booker?refcode=em201025i_1072&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
In the Senate, Senator Durbin and I passed the First Step Act, a criminal justice bill that substantially reforms sentencing guidelines, prison conditions, law enforcement training, and re-entry efforts. We should be building on this progress -- but Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP are more concerned with rushing President Trump's nominee onto the Supreme Court.
**It 's clear that if we want to move this country forward, we need to take back the Senate.**
**[With so much on the line and only 9 days left to go, will you split a contribution between my campaign and my good friend Dick Durbin's work to flip the Senate in November?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201025-cory-booker?refcode=em201025i_1072&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Cory Booker

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201025-cory-booker?refcode=em201025i_1072&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff453a/42ab3cf4/667b99ef/135d1884/1522724918/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff453a/42ab3cf4/667b99ef/135d1885/1522724918/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NEW AD FROM KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS DOUG COLLINS FOR HIS TIES TO BIG TECH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 26, 2020
NEW AD FROM KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS DOUG COLLINS FOR HIS TIES TO BIG TECH
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released a new ad that slams career politician Doug Collins for his friendly ties with Big Tech. The ad, "[Big Tech](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DmlsHc3nZNxtBrD9172Jf22oCHl6_Sf_C_Q5jJ_HLWSXmi3pF90i4r7zHNY_ecuMJg3PluPiJQa6ABxcO96bHzry3lsaSbEkzz8kLj8EP7rSj5KHXPYHED3Y6li92CbTxGF-Sb_9zkiuQOBdslj1oOXJJsrQao4KRemPWRq-wWUGaw4W8DXygiaQ9pBP__7BUJ4_JMCmnd56wh8sjcnRvJS7RMkbcTtgWBySUHyXItqXkwcKMT8S-g==&c=AcLkzlnA46dH153cX_nJzUTHUQv-_yEGRghA8Q7k3P2rj7eO1avGJQ==&ch=ftnVh8Zw-Jb2h2eEf-m6Ak_PvadF0S0ibNTBg8P_3L5lMzWVbm8tSA==)," hits D.C. Doug for [cozying up](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DmlsHc3nZNxtBrD9172Jf22oCHl6_Sf_C_Q5jJ_HLWSXmi3pF90i4r7zHNY_ecuMsJcF_HMG94d4U2fo8eHW6u4cEADMQJ1dMHbIK5Evu6GDegx5MuVMwRHEop7s8GXGyNlG32456bR6iKRp9WolVUBW1IiCmy6AoNbQ5uOG528=&c=AcLkzlnA46dH153cX_nJzUTHUQv-_yEGRghA8Q7k3P2rj7eO1avGJQ==&ch=ftnVh8Zw-Jb2h2eEf-m6Ak_PvadF0S0ibNTBg8P_3L5lMzWVbm8tSA==) to the same Big-Tech companies that are covering up the Biden scandal and censoring conservatives like President Trump. ---
| | | | | | Monday, October 26th 2020

| Virginia's Right to Work Status is on the ballot!
---
| She admitted it plainly in Thursday's debate: Elaine supports mandatory union membership in Virginia.
What does that mean for us? Luria supports policies that would destroy jobs in key Virginia industries and delay the economic recovery of our businesses.
Luria has and will work to eradicate Virginia's right to work status which would cripple our competitive job market.
Meanwhile, Scott Taylor is endorsed by the small business community (the National Federation of Independent Businesses!). Scott is the pro-business candidate we need in Congress!
Luria tries to campaign as a moderate, but the reality of her radical liberal agenda is crystal clear. With just 8 days until Election Day, we need your help now to help us in the final stretch of this critical campaign! Please consider donating NOW!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?refcode=102620Olson)
| | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Speaker Hortman's email last night. **She 's absolutely right**: we can't go back to where we were in 2016. We need to protect and expand our majority and reject the President's politics of hate and division. Will you consider investing in our grassroots organization today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=102620Olson) _ _ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=102620Olson) _ _ [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=102620Olson) _ _ [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=102620Olson) _ _ [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=102620Olson) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Vice President Pence will be visiting Minnesota again tomorrow and polls are tightening statewide. Minnesota is a battleground for the future of our state and country. Together, we can restore decency to our country. Thank you, Rep. Liz Olson (DFL - Duluth) Majority Whip Minnesota House of Representatives P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?refcode=102620Olson) \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: House DFL Team <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Sat, Oct 10, 2020 at 8:36 AM Subject: Expanding the map Friend, We are only nine days away from the end of the 2020 election cycle. As you know based on our early voting numbers, the election is very much underway. This is far and away the most important election of our lifetime, and we have an incredible opportunity in the next few days to set the course of our state and restore decency in our country. For four long years we have watched Donald Trump rip apart our country. For the first two years of his presidency, the Minnesota Legislature was controlled by Republicans who followed his lead, putting forth legislation meant to divide us. We cannot go back to where we were in 2016. Since DFLers took back the Minnesota House, we have protected health care for 1.2 million Minnesotans, passed the strongest wage theft law in the country, guaranteed Minnesotans access to affordable emergency insulin, made strong investments in our schools, and passed the largest jobs and infrastructure investment package in state history. What we are doing here today is bigger than just winning or losing a House seat or being right about an issue, it's about saving lives and the soul of our nation. We need your help. If you are able, please consider investing in our campaign today. Candidates all across the state could also use your help making phone calls and turning out the vote in this last stretch of the campaign. _ _ [**Contribute**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?refcode=102620Olson) [**Volunteer**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/HGqRMgb-zfsAmCH2NARTkv293LuktJkzwYqYiOxRL3Q=) There is so much on the line, and I am incredibly proud of the work you are doing. We are in a strong position heading into the final week, but we can't take our foot off the gas just yet. Polls are tightening and we need to do everything we can to protect and expand our majority. With your help, we can win this. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hK7Ab6sqH8BVj6EydclbNQrCJa2WJlwD2TwpEFPIB3w=/csw2mQjwuV0IITq_Duocyw2JtooXhmWTSqpDKEqf6Tw=?refcode=102620Olson)

My campaign is in the midst of a historic voter mobilization effort here in TX-10 and I’d love for you to be a part of it. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Over the weekend, our campaign contacted thousands of TX-10 voters — but our work is not over. We’re polling only one point behind and can’t take any voter for granted if we want to win on Election Day. We’re stronger the more folks join our movement — and we’re running out of time to take this Texas toss-up to a victory. We need you on the team today and up until every vote is cast and counted. I’m hoping you’ll hop on board and go all-in on this historic campaign to flip TX-10.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’ve got this if we stick together! name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Confirmation vote TODAY & Election Day in 8 days! Week of Oct. 26th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
The final vote to confirm Amy Coney Barrett will likely be held TODAY, Monday, October 26.
We have an action item to support this confirmation, and an action item to do after she is confirmed, as well as election-related action items.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Supreme Court Action
**Before the Vote: Call Your Senators to Push for Confirmation**
Today is the day, so make your calls as early as you can. When you call, simply say that you want to see Amy Coney Barrett confirmed today. Call whether you have Republican or Democrat Senators.
To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial [(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyODgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=HNH91jPHAax-SW3CDxgX8A "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the names of your Senators, use the map on this page. Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.
**After the Vote: Call Senators to Say Thank You**
Starting on Tuesday, if your Senator(s) voted to confirm Amy Coney Barrett, call to say thank you – especially if your Senator is up for re-election this year. They are human too, and they often only get calls telling them to vote one way or another, and less frequently get calls thanking them.

How will you know if your Senator(s) voted for Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation? Two ways. First, it’s very likely that no Democrats will vote for her confirmation. The second way to know is to search “Senate roll call votes Amy Coney Barrett” online, and you’ll find websites with the list of yea’s and nay’s.
|
---
Get Out the Vote Action
There are three ways you can help re-elect President Trump, and we only have a week left, so we need as many volunteers as we can get!

**Text Messaging**

1. **To get started go to:[tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyODgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=y_ZthLmTHTPaXSQWEZCUiw) **– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

2. **You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

**If you need additional instructions[you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMjBQMlBUZXh0aW5nSW5zdHJ1Y3Rpb25zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4ODAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_K7fDpCEY-y3rHWvWSAzxw).** But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.

**Phone Banking & Sending Letters to Voters**
If you are interested in calling voters or printing out and mailing letters to voters (the letter is pre-written, so you don’t need to write one!), we are near the deadline of getting those out. **[Please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3BhdHJpb3Rwcm9qZWN0Lz9taWQ9NDI4ODAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MQl7jq4FxPOekopIh3rTkA) and we will get you plugged in! **

_**NOTE: All letters need to be sent by tomorrow, October 27th, so if you you would like to send some, please get a letter packet from us and get them sent out by then.**_
|
---
VOTE!!!
**Make sure you vote! If you can vote in person, vote in person! If you need to vote by absentee ballot, get your ballot turned in on time! If you can vote early, vote early!**

While we wish voting was limited to one day as it used to be, the fact that early voting exists makes fraud easier. It opens the door to someone else voting early in your place, so if you can, vote early to make sure it is YOU who is doing the voting in your name.

Be sure to get your Trump-supporting friends and family to vote too. Text them, call them, email them, and remind them to go vote or turn in their ballots. Offer them a ride to the polls – do what you can to help them vote!
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of October 26th

Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are asking that you talk to your kids or grandkids about voting. If you can, take them with you to vote, or show them your absentee ballot if you are voting that way.**

Discuss with them the importance of voting and what it means to be able to vote. Talk to them about integrity and honesty, and why we need to protect the integrity of our elections. Discuss the fact that there are people who want to cheat in order to win and gain power, and so why we must guard against that.

Finally, use the election and voting as a jumping off point to again discuss the exceptionalism of the American experiment and the wisdom of our Founders. Specifically, teach them about the “tyranny of the majority,” and why our Founding Fathers deliberately tried to prevent this from happening in America. And, why we are a republic and not a democracy.

Because of the miseducation and indoctrination by progressives, too many Americans believe we are democracy, and during elections, this myth is pushed even harder. We must teach our children and grandchildren the truth, and this is the perfect time to do it.

Use this article/report from The Heritage Foundation, [“Preventing ‘The Tyranny of the Majority’”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnNlcnZhdGlzbS9jb21tZW50YXJ5L3ByZXZlbnRpbmctdGhlLXR5cmFubnktdGhlLW1ham9yaXR5P21pZD00Mjg4MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=d8_0lGDob69eIHuNfkWSfA) to help you in your discussion with your kids and grandkids. Depend on their ages, you might need to read it and distill the ideas into something simpler, or if they’re older, you can both read it and then discuss.
|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL2RvbmF0ZT9taWQ9NDI4ODAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZX2ERoelsTSjZH-aPnvTmQ)
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzAwLTY1ZDE1OGRiODE2MjQxMTlhNjVkZjk4Mjg2OGI1NGYx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kP21pZD00Mjg4MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=pQjR7rikIwqf58GtFmXNFg)

In just eight days this election will be over, friends. Before I go any further, I want to let you know it’s been a privilege to work for Central Texas and my community. This is normally a safe Republican seat. But, through the hard work of my staff, supporters, and Democrats around the district, we’ve made this a real horse race. And no matter the result we’ve accomplished something amazing. But I’m not going to be satisfied unless we win, and I’m doing everything in my power to get us across the finish line. **So, for one last time, I’m setting an end-of-month goal to raise $12,000 before midnight on Saturday.[_Can I count on you to chip in anything you can right now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20791362/258364686/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201026EOM1_RK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAzY2NjMi05ZjE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sGuYxebrbUEAvzy_I3o6tgC7lkX2PWV8JPxqbWj2dQ=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20791363/258364687/-1907457921?express_lane=true&amount=10&fl_email_fr_20201026EOM1_RK_all_xx_abx10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAzY2NjMi05ZjE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sGuYxebrbUEAvzy_I3o6tgC7lkX2PWV8JPxqbWj2dQ=)**

name: Rita Hart (via iPhone)
subject: I need your help now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa |
body:
I want to make sure you know the situation we’re in. If we don’t stay on course with our grassroots fundraising, we risk needing to pull all of our ads down.

My opponent and the D.C. interests trying to buy this election are hoping we’ll run out of money, so I’m hoping I can count on you to help us raise the small-dollar donations we need to prove them wrong.

Can you donate whatever you can to keep our ads running throughout the district? Any amount will make a huge difference. secure.actblue.com/donate/2010-q4-rh?refcode=201026-am-email

Thanks,

Rita

(sent via iPhone)

subject: The numbers are getting better every day
body:
As of right now, 5,351 people who did not vote in either 2016 or 2018 have already voted here in the Illinois 16th and over 11,000 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/09194cc474d4/the-numbers-are-getting-better-every-day?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
As of right now, 5,351 people who did not vote in either 2016 or 2018 have already voted here in the Illinois 16th and over 11,000 brand new voters have applied to vote by mail. **These numbers are rising every day as we approach Election Day. **

The early voting numbers in IL-16 demonstrate what we have heard from voters for the past 13 months of the campaign — that people are eager for change and excited about the prospect of electing leaders who will advocate and agitate for solutions to the very real problems we all face day in and day out.

Though much has changed since the race began, the enthusiasm for real representation has not, and the early voting and mail numbers — the turnout among new or inconsistent voters — suggest that we are looking at a restoration of power to the people. **A wave of voters who are reclaiming their voices and casting votes in this incredibly meaningful election.**

Everyone is saying that this election will have the highest turnout ever - and the early numbers in IL-16 back it up. **That is why I need your help.** Since there will be more votes cast than ever before, we need even more money to reach these new voters in these final, crucial days. The potential to win this election is real. The district is ripe for an upset and it’s evident we have the momentum.

[Can I count on you to chip in and help us flip IL-16?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2b151a2f77&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

---
**WEEK IN REVIEW**
**Less than 10 DAYS until Election Day**

We released our 7th ad titled "Welfare for Politicians" highlighting Democrat Incumbent Joe Cunningham's vote to line his own pockets with $5 million dollars in taxpayer money to pay for his personal expenses and campaign ads.

**📺[WATCH Nancy's Newest TV ad, "Welfare for Politicians"](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=f46b589491484b84a60efa179e05872f&_e=gvYBCcJFaIR0llSbWrwsXgnQymuhZy-871ktd_X_0-lZFr3-_LFbMclmeYENTLYK59HFVhRzIogZwter7_HuZ-Vw0VBfhplHS-A1ABF_c5YaoJDRadi6eaniFrf4dDwDfUxSWTnTokMpQm5aVaWBweyLR8RhNkJAu3CKx1SMrayHwi2VAbbqjz_0GFlYmmOp0nuBMoHSMz31wnJb5BCM-N4I7PKbj1zfRWUTAYvpxpwcyGNzFK3EOolT13NSs5TdpUd-eboGry5NaVsIXFvr8NDl43398EeAZd5Zjz1snr5DPU1YgapL4Cw67_4KH7qQsko2ElZJLJtPph1_wOsiu0Z8M5C4SlEj0hYfh-wKHhyaeLZSyNiaz4lFE1JG32SLMfyO4VXeNqn6Laa__yntLqSM87W5oNwQ4IZiO4VJ2drvFNjArzC-Dn2TMvrRK759uPFzd6bhVEOIcDXuIu9Bow%3D%3D) 📺**

In the final stretch, we're knock, knock, knocking! Our Lowcountry ground game is unmatched, and our momentum is surging in the final weeks of the campaign. And Newsmax took notice (see below).

On Wednesday, Nancy rallied with voters in Beaufort County to Get Out The Vote. On Saturday, Team Mace and the SC GOP hosted College Republicans for a huge door knocking effort.

Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from Team Mace each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org. 📩

Thank you for your support!

-Mara, Campaign Manager
|

clean_body: Congressman Cunningham voted for $5 million in taxpayer dollars to be spent on his campaign ads and personal expenses, Nancy campaigned in Beaufort | | WEEK IN REVIEW Less than 10 DAYS until Election Day We released our 7th ad titled "Welfare for Politicians" highlighting Democrat Incumbent Joe Cunningham's vote to line his own pockets with $5 million dollars in taxpayer money to pay for his personal expenses and campaign ads. 📺 📺 In the final stretch, we're knock, knock, knocking! Our Lowcountry ground game is unmatched, and our momentum is surging in the final weeks of the campaign. And Newsmax took notice (see below). On Wednesday, Nancy rallied with voters in Beaufort County to Get Out The Vote. On Saturday, Team Mace and the SC GOP hosted College Republicans for a huge door knocking effort. Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from Team Mace each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org. 📩 Thank you for your support! -Mara, Campaign Manager | This Week on the Campaign Trail Democrat Joe Cunningham voted to line his pockets with taxpayer money to pay for things like personal expenses and even his own campaign ads. See our new ad here: On Wednesday, Nancy spend the day in Beaufort County with South Carolina Republican Party and Beaufort County GOP Getting Out The Vote! Newsmax covers Nancy's poll surge. Nancy is up 2 points ahead of Joe Cunningham! This race is tight but we've got the momentum on our side and can't be stopped 💪 Have you seen Nancy and our army of volunteers our in your neighborhood? We are knocking thousands of doors a day all across the district. 🚪Knock with Nancy! On Saturday, S.C. Federation of College Republicans Got Out The Vote for Nancy! body:
With just 8 days to go and undecided voters left to reach, we have a lot of ground to cover. And we're running out of time. Our FINAL End of Month deadline is just 5 days away and reaching our goal has never been more important.""
.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rJ2O-H-0896Nx9laS4yyH0GyCCrfXD-zik2_AAlRAZvu0dNzceO4QwlyBHTY0m8gVGbxRYyMceSg_ubbogg5H4zwT-oQ8s9aLbiJ2jge_n_Uopmzz37EA-EjBlRa3qi7UI06LqAI1odiObm5ARi2cmYvkUXUzsL8QjJJ3fWdyZ640AXlg3wszli7zkBXTacTp5cFoNl-cj7XfAsLH3Na__fEe1XGCoswLo8hJtVoSOfzcvOj9Ml3_eTSE4fQqvZj77lX5qTs5jXbc5zbiBTzfOkA2EXHqs4_uZd-Elh_0Wd9S_zXNHbKTCtKHg8B2piSLyc2hMIk5x7n4sxnwxl2r7Sx2P4U8PECY1FoucZI5lnWe2C6nVxickqk__DvEQ00MagnQcKQghd_Bki3XITcO_IzfW0usYork-FHX2pcvqKaHlc7QCqJdsWG3Ftph-2U&c=VP8e8dRcxxz_dLvHs1-UGOATaPHhmICUYYnHgV7ZmjJL2UssR7SGCw==&ch=t1rBj5opfsTkZA1aWXJ9V6YvjQrQrY-tQnk2xNFTP3LRBM_aE9VUVA==) Friend, with just 8 days to go and undecided voters left to reach, we have a lot of ground to cover. _And we 're running out of time._

**Our FINAL End of Month deadline is just 5 days away** and reaching our goal has never been more important. [**Can you rush in an emergency donation to get us over the finish line?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rJ2O-H-0896Nx9laS4yyH0GyCCrfXD-zik2_AAlRAZvu0dNzceO4Q_nIjTZQffWFUmz3qNWD0KAqS3wOqwiopzBmW0-8QtHflwcs_Th8GNTnu86_-1CE9Utnpo8egR8vm_mvRDmg06GsyMp8fy3wouxgHDyqpKzZK-i4FQjdNrGvZGkC2MoE5onMhdnanh3RE2QinfhtmXz5Y76E7uNSp75XJjo6vm5qV8oaHgPaAUnnpbpBSBnzcl3MHwts8z-PcEmHrNLC16qp2gOE26hd1dPobCHd6iqle7jiDZ_Kw7s45XwKtFY3VZZSZZv5QSReNbCHKDMuE2m6nL9Qih3jGHRfIeTdgoNYZ30Yc6o9Glwmxc9wcRja9tc9iUEMB_g5inKBsSkQE5Z5etHyLbLOXQLnxCSKQrkMLndLqjssbeMVJdn-Q0zF78IOENzwkLXb&c=VP8e8dRcxxz_dLvHs1-UGOATaPHhmICUYYnHgV7ZmjJL2UssR7SGCw==&ch=t1rBj5opfsTkZA1aWXJ9V6YvjQrQrY-tQnk2xNFTP3LRBM_aE9VUVA==)

Reaching our goal means having the resources to run ads - online and on-air - send mail, expand our GOTV program, and ultimately WIN on Election Day. Falling short means jeopardizing our victory.

We can't take anything for granted. Not in an election year as critical as this and not with Pelosi's Socialist Mob raising record-breaking hauls at a record-breaking pace. They raised $70.5 million last quarter and are using it to reach deep _into Trump territory. _

No one is safe from Pelosi's deep pockets. [**Friend, can I count on you to defend this seat? We need all hands on deck from now until November 3rd.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rJ2O-H-0896Nx9laS4yyH0GyCCrfXD-zik2_AAlRAZvu0dNzceO4Q_nIjTZQffWFUmz3qNWD0KAqS3wOqwiopzBmW0-8QtHflwcs_Th8GNTnu86_-1CE9Utnpo8egR8vm_mvRDmg06GsyMp8fy3wouxgHDyqpKzZK-i4FQjdNrGvZGkC2MoE5onMhdnanh3RE2QinfhtmXz5Y76E7uNSp75XJjo6vm5qV8oaHgPaAUnnpbpBSBnzcl3MHwts8z-PcEmHrNLC16qp2gOE26hd1dPobCHd6iqle7jiDZ_Kw7s45XwKtFY3VZZSZZv5QSReNbCHKDMuE2m6nL9Qih3jGHRfIeTdgoNYZ30Yc6o9Glwmxc9wcRja9tc9iUEMB_g5inKBsSkQE5Z5etHyLbLOXQLnxCSKQrkMLndLqjssbeMVJdn-Q0zF78IOENzwkLXb&c=VP8e8dRcxxz_dLvHs1-UGOATaPHhmICUYYnHgV7ZmjJL2UssR7SGCw==&ch=t1rBj5opfsTkZA1aWXJ9V6YvjQrQrY-tQnk2xNFTP3LRBM_aE9VUVA==)

There's simply too much at stake: balancing the budget, lowering taxes, stopping a federalized version of AB 5, providing affordable healthcare, ending wasteful government spending, supporting law enforcement, creating jobs... just to name a few. Jay has promised to defend President Trump's conservative agenda, but he needs our help getting to Washington first.

name: John Cornyn
subject: state of this race
body:
Friend, With just 8 days left in this race, I wanted to reach out and give you an update on where we stand.
The truth is, we find ourselves in a pretty tough spot. It's truly make or break time.
A few things about my liberal opponent.
She's swimming in cash. In the past few weeks, Chuck Schumer and his super PAC conspirators have placed a seven-figure buy on MJ's behalf. Coupled with MJ's HUGE $14,000,000 third quarter she's ERASED our cash advantage.
She has the liberal media's FULL support, Forget fact checks. Forget unbiased reporting. You might as well add the liberal media to MJ's campaign payroll. Don't believe a word they say.
Friend, if we are not careful, MJ's late sprint could carry her to victory.
She's surging at the right moment. She has the money needed to reach all of Texas undecided voters. This is serious.
**[That's why I'm challenging you, as one of my top supporters, to do your part to STOP HER!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUeBUofffvbyyz7hopKYScM6B4bbU2eP1tUy9mGMrOwGPf29rFx-J4VNqQd1KKIL83Hvy2g0AINE9Wz8qnax8zu_3gJ492TORioKY3adf9cEXNUew2QEtWz6mdmsRJ8Q8u9lKddqZlPhU0wKrYM11juWGTMqnFBl5gdyEzu-XhIsH2mW_N2aH-o72bKuNWv5uhQzy2gk_4mxqUYoAXV3w79agob-IXIvQVZAPLEn_mIP_t_lCnymMFnJOkq9fedS8ZBb869SxxBUf4cwQQgkFr4xo8IkcZXjG_Vmo8eJY8LFfQ0A5vFl0dtR66tt8XkjJMK5nQ5GEvjppmASDMezZnInzgHTxYBr1Um2P4THkPxF8mDtEML7N-79cbHTZtOU&c=r9LtRsbJ2ryH_nTzb_G49zI6GX-8dvyLzXu52l1Z2DUBBVEgHIvtKA==&ch=ZklmaK9X61zrKAxYn-JQl_T-0uXFxFG_YJbg-gRHNDLGOZVDE9Bs9w==)** It will be rushed to counter MJ's huge TV buys. It will be spread around Texas to help contact more voters.
It is absolutely critical.
Will you get in this fight with me, Friend?
John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUeBUofffvbyyz7hopKYScM6B4bbU2eP1tUy9mGMrOwGPf29rFx-J246Yv8gDhcbvp3ZGtUkc8TmZLG17edp5j9PoEeADyGVR8ODQlLI9qNlpIeXIRPhoVwm1BmlHD_pyttlUV6D9PnwctMDqO7Rd4u9OsqGq_hVrLh8i42aa-A=&c=r9LtRsbJ2ryH_nTzb_G49zI6GX-8dvyLzXu52l1Z2DUBBVEgHIvtKA==&ch=ZklmaK9X61zrKAxYn-JQl_T-0uXFxFG_YJbg-gRHNDLGOZVDE9Bs9w==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUeBUofffvbyyz7hopKYScM6B4bbU2eP1tUy9mGMrOwGPf29rFx-J7gM-obFE0HqT6iQqYp_wJwEN1qeL9WayWIlSn4X17xRhdbi-TjY0cU7DGvU1Zt276sY-qkFici16ikkdnJQ2lKTugfgsPPBp8qUsOgH6shJ&c=r9LtRsbJ2ryH_nTzb_G49zI6GX-8dvyLzXu52l1Z2DUBBVEgHIvtKA==&ch=ZklmaK9X61zrKAxYn-JQl_T-0uXFxFG_YJbg-gRHNDLGOZVDE9Bs9w==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUeBUofffvbyyz7hopKYScM6B4bbU2eP1tUy9mGMrOwGPf29rFx-J246Yv8gDhcbaYy-ibc1IHEqZv3UyajS-gUuCwbyxVWJsChX0d_RjdN3j2tYPJPIIyqrwpDUUPIVZnBcFvU8uT2S1BCFL0LzP6bPhEQyFqpaVSIxXSBSTAF1k5kyaIiQfw==&c=r9LtRsbJ2ryH_nTzb_G49zI6GX-8dvyLzXu52l1Z2DUBBVEgHIvtKA==&ch=ZklmaK9X61zrKAxYn-JQl_T-0uXFxFG_YJbg-gRHNDLGOZVDE9Bs9w==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VUeBUofffvbyyz7hopKYScM6B4bbU2eP1tUy9mGMrOwGPf29rFx-J6itwwvgHvVLnIomim8yzQj3PvalbcMpxpMS-KwqxsDmflPG5wAy_OgSnaC7U9I1KefMTKefqNNKHjwN45ojsjHMvRzpbUNM_iEB9KvZ3l1oESqf_wfRo7JECV3US0p4DdLa0LoNi4wPxl_r1lkFcJQ9iZ9UXq6KrDDVjw9G5gAOibGRubGjFJbib-sB1fa7gFFv5OXKxPxUSfg17qwmPGwsB0Svm7cZVuS82SyRN5rXzX5bYi0QzX-r2Kg7oeKnxQ==&c=r9LtRsbJ2ryH_nTzb_G49zI6GX-8dvyLzXu52l1Z2DUBBVEgHIvtKA==&ch=ZklmaK9X61zrKAxYn-JQl_T-0uXFxFG_YJbg-gRHNDLGOZVDE9Bs9w==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows: 1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible. | | Texans for Senator John Cornyn | PO BOX 13026, Austin, TX 78711 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Todd Young
subject: Today is a big day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Today is a big win for those of us who love our Constitution. Amy Coney Barrett is an impeccable nominee who will stand by our founding principles, and won't legislate from the bench.
Friend, today is a big win for those of us who love our Constitution. Amy Coney Barrett is an impeccable nominee who will stand by our founding principles, and won't legislate from the bench.

But, Friend, there is bad news that goes along with this great news. If Republicans lose the Senate and the White House next week, Democrats will pack the Supreme Court. They will add seats and put truly radical Justices on the bench, who will do the opposite of everything Amy Coney Barrett will do.

That's why I am asking you to stand with me in helping defend our Republican Majority and defend our Supreme Court. name: Steph (Team Steel)
subject: Edge of victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:

Voters in my Oregon district need to see my final ad, but I can't afford to run it. Republicans have few offensive opportunities this year – and quite frankly, one of the best shots our Party has to flip a House seat this cycle is the seat I’m running for in Oregon. Peter,

I have both DeFazio and the Democrat powerbrokers in Washington running scared – they know that if Peter loses on Election Day, **they won’t have a point person to direct trillions in new spending that progressives have on their wish list for next year**.

By all accounts this race is going to be close – and I need your help to make sure voters in my district see the closing ad that I recently shot. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, I have both DeFazio and the Democrat powerbrokers in Washington running scared – they know that if Peter loses on Election Day, they won’t have a point person to direct trillions in new spending that progressives have on their wish list for next year. By all accounts this race is going to be close – and I need your help to make sure voters in my district see the closing ad that I recently shot. The only thing is, . and if after watching you think It would help an undecided voter make up their mind, Help Me Keep My Ad Running | | | ---|---|--- | | Election Day is right around the corner – in a blink of an eye it’s going to be over. Here in Oregon’s 4th District we’re in the midst of a historic race; last week, the race between me and the co-sponsor of the Green New Deal, socialist swamp bureaucrat Peter DeFazio , was declared the most expensive race in state history. Wow. Very respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

name: Team Messner
subject: This Past Week: Corky's Debate with Jeanne Shaheen and President Trump Returns to NH!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/6aa64a4f17ce1432c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/aee4f2b73d295052c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Calls Out Shaheen’s Failures, Flip-Flops in Final Senate Debate**
In the last of three debates, Corky won a heated hour-long confrontation with incumbent Jeanne Shaheen on October 20th.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/053de99e76260ed1c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
During **[the hourlong debate](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/9995b9b7a41769d5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** broadcast on WMUR-TV, he blasted his opponent for her many flip-flops – notably her support then disavowal of socialized medicine, and claiming to champion middle class tax cuts while supporting a repeal of Trump tax cuts. He also pointed to her 30 years in politics and her blind loyalty to her party’s leadership, as a career politician who has abandoned Granite Staters.

The strongest exchange came when the two discussed foreign policy, specifically the presence of U.S. troops in Syria. Messner pointed out that **[Shaheen had dismissed the loss of American lives](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/7dcf0661a89d37bbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** , referring to the “minimal cost” of U.S. forces in the region, despite several American casualties.

“I take that personally,” said Messner, a veteran who has a son now on active duty and another at West Point.

He also called out the Senator on positions he says shows she has abandoned Granite Staters.

“Jeanne Shaheen is a 30-year career politician who has become a party loyalist, rather than the moderate bipartisan working for the people of New Hampshire that she claims to be,” said Corky in comments after the debate. “She votes in lock-step with her party’s leadership. She supports tax increases, supports abolishing of the Electoral College and with it New Hampshire’s first-in-the-nation primary, and wants to politicize the Supreme Court, all with the ultimate goal of moving our country toward a progressive, socialist agenda.”

**[Read more debate highlights](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/79c90c2985a9f5cec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

PS – Corky this past week also invited Senator Shaheen to participate in two more debates, but she refused.
|
---
**As Shaheen Portrays Herself as Fighting the Opioid Crisis, Lawyer Husband Represents Opioid Maker Fined this Week by DOJ**
As U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen portrayed herself as a champion in the opioid crisis in New Hampshire, her attorney husband’s law firm represented OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma, which this week reached an $8 billion settlement with the U.S. Justice Department that includes the largest penalties ever levied against a pharmaceutical company.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/dbf6416a4296c980c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Shaheen & Gordon represented Purdue Pharma when it was sued by the city of Nashua in 2017. The State of New Hampshire and the City of Manchester also filed suit against the pharmaceutical company for its role in fueling the opioid crisis.

“While Senator Shaheen claimed she was doing all she could to help New Hampshire deal with this crisis, her husband was working for the company that caused it,” says Corky. “Her first television ad in this campaign was about the opioid battle, yet she has long accepted campaign donations from other ‘big pharma’ companies.

“Considering that she portrays herself as an ally in the battle against opioids, you’d think she might at least have rejected those contributions, or been honest about the fact her husband was fighting for the other side.”

**[Read more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/d5369c00dd857a44c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**President Trump Returns to New Hampshire**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/09ee0963b628a0d7c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/8b74d3c0c720e1fdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
President Trump was the center of attention at a major rally at Manchester-Boston Regional Airport Sunday, October 25, and Corky was proud to address the crowd in advance of the President's arrival. Once again, Corky got a major shout-out, as the President reminded the large crowd that Corky is a candidate that deserves their support, as he also applauded other Republican GOP candidates. Go, Corky - and President Trump!
|
---
**In The News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/a0cbb556511bb89bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
This past week, Corky spoke to Mike Pomp of WTSN, on the popular "Open Mic” program. During their chat, Corky recapped the debate, talked about the misrepresentation of his comments by his opponent, and many other issues. You can **[listen in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/cc1a3068640128fec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**!
|
---
**Corky: Shaheen Should Have Condemned Senate Judiciary Committee Democrats' No-Show on SCOTUS Vote**
Corky called on incumbent Jeanne Shaheen to take fellow Democrats to task for their no-show on this past week’s vote moving Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination to the full Senate.
“Democrat members of the Judiciary Committee not showing up for a critical vote on this Supreme Court nomination is outrageous. Talk about political theater of the absurd,” he said. “Our Senator must make clear to Granite State voters that this stunt does nothing but reinforce the belief that our political leaders are failing in their duty. Unfortunately, she will remain silent, since she is a party loyalist and not interested in what is best for our nation or our state.”

Absent Democrats had placed cardboard cutouts of themselves in their committee chairs in advance of the vote. “As someone who continues to portray herself as a bipartisan moderate, Senator Shaheen should at least publicly agree this was a childish political temper tantrum that further divides us and makes reasoned political discourse impossible. Yet another sign that it is time for a change.”
|
---
**Get Your Corky Signs Today!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/54e1333479903707c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
An official Corky for Senate yard sign is a great way to show everyone where you stand and support the campaign! Request yours now before we run out! **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d849656b56fc4ea8/c06f75f8c7ca1209c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to learn more.
|
---
**On The Trail**
We started last week with a bang: Corky supporters were out in force outside WMUR studios for Tuesday’s debate. And there was more excitement, with a visit by Vice President Pence and connecting with Granite Staters across New Hampshire. We’re getting down to the wire!

|

Tracey

name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: A real deal MAGA patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
To him, MAGA isn’t a campaign slogan - it’s a promise to the American people. | |
---
This MAGA Republican made a MAJOR difference in the historic Trump-Pence campaign in 2016, and he’ll make a difference in Congress.

**WEEK IN REVIEW**
**Less than 10 DAYS until Election Day**

We released our 7th ad titled "Welfare for Politicians" highlighting Democrat Incumbent Joe Cunningham's vote to line his own pockets with $5 million dollars in taxpayer money to pay for his personal expenses and campaign ads.

On Wednesday, Nancy rallied with voters in Beaufort County to Get Out The Vote. On Saturday, Team Mace and the SC GOP hosted College Republicans for a huge door knocking effort.

Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from Team Mace each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org. 📩

Thank you for your support!

-Mara, Campaign Manager

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: A Candidate Who Will Put Houston First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Only 5 days of early voting remain in the 2020 election cycle. And as you
prepare to make your decision at the ballot box, over the next 5 days we wanted
to share with you 5 of the many reasons to elect Wesley Hunt as the next
Representative for Texas' 7th Congressional District.

In many ways, our country is in a crisis. As we work to recover from the
coronavirus pandemic, we are grappling with widespread division and economic
hardship. Therefore, it is paramount that we elect a leader who will set
politics aside and prioritize the people they have vowed to serve. We need a
leader who will put service before self and country before politics.

Wesley Hunt is the only candidate on the ballot who has lived these
principles day in and day out. And these values will define his service in
Congress.

Wesley's family has always put service of their country and of their
community first. His immediate family has nearly 60 years of military service
between them, and their ethos of selfless service has guided Wesley's campaign
for Congress.

In the military, no one asks if you are a Republican or a Democrat, they ask
if you can do the work to protect our country and the freedoms we cherish. And
that service mindset is what it will take to lead Houston beyond the challenges
we face today.

While in the Army, Wesley completed three tours of duty in the Middle East,
including 55 combat air missions in Iraq. During that time, Wesley learned what
it means to put the mission first, even if it means sacrificing everything.

The 7th District needs a leader like Wesley in Congress. We don't need
another career politician who will play politics with our interests, we need an
honest advocate who will ensure Houston has a seat at the table in Washington.
While Wesley's opponent has voted with Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time,
allowed Pelosi to deny Houston's Energy Corridor access to COVID relief
funding, advocated for a government takeover of our healthcare, and voted to
make it harder for our law enforcement to keep our communities safe, Wesley has
proven he will always put Houston first.

And we know Wesley will follow through on the promises he makes, just as he
has done his entire life. This year, we hope you will elect Wesley Hunt in
Texas' 7th District. He will be the advocate and leader the people of Houston
deserve.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

clean_body: Friend, Only 5 days of early voting remain in the 2020 election cycle. And as you prepare to make your decision at the ballot box, over the next 5 days we wanted to share with you 5 of the many reasons to elect Wesley Hunt as the next Representative for Texas' 7th Congressional District. In many ways, our country is in a crisis. As we work to recover from the coronavirus pandemic, we are grappling with widespread division and economic hardship. Therefore, it is paramount that we elect a leader who will set politics aside and prioritize the people they have vowed to serve. We need a leader who will put service before self and country before politics. Wesley Hunt is the only candidate on the ballot who has lived these principles day in and day out. And these values will define his service in Congress. Wesley's family has always put service of their country and of their community first. His immediate family has nearly 60 years of military service between them, and their ethos of selfless service has guided Wesley's campaign for Congress. In the military, no one asks if you are a Republican or a Democrat, they ask if you can do the work to protect our country and the freedoms we cherish. And that service mindset is what it will take to lead Houston beyond the challenges we face today. While in the Army, Wesley completed three tours of duty in the Middle East, including 55 combat air missions in Iraq. During that time, Wesley learned what it means to put the mission first, even if it means sacrificing everything. The 7th District needs a leader like Wesley in Congress. We don't need another career politician who will play politics with our interests, we need an honest advocate who will ensure Houston has a seat at the table in Washington. While Wesley's opponent has voted with Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time, allowed Pelosi to deny Houston's Energy Corridor access to COVID relief funding, advocated for a government takeover of our healthcare, and voted to make it harder for our law enforcement to keep our communities safe, Wesley has proven he will always put Houston first. And we know Wesley will follow through on the promises he makes, just as he has done his entire life. This year, we hope you will elect Wesley Hunt in Texas' 7th District. He will be the advocate and leader the people of Houston deserve. Thank you, Team Hunt Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Today's SCOTUS vote makes state leadership more important than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
In Washington state, health care will be protected.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp) Friend, Today, the Senate is voting on whether or not to confirm Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett. All indications point to her being confirmed -- putting the future of reproductive justice and the _Affordable Care Act_ in serious jeopardy. **But what's clear is this: It will come down to state leaders to protect health care, including reproductive freedoms, pre-existing conditions, affordable choice, and more. I've spent my career doing just that, so I'm asking:[Will you join me in fighting to protect affordable, accessible health care?](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/protect-our-health-care/?utm_source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&t=4&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/protect-our-health-care/?utm_source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&t=5&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp)
---
In Washington state, we made history last year:
Our public option -- a first-in-the-nation public option we call Cascade Care -- will ensure that Washingtonians have high-quality health insurance and an affordable option available across the state of Washington. Starting in 2021, all carriers on the Washington Health Benefit Exchange will be required to offer at least one state-defined "standard plan," which will limit out-of-pocket costs, provide transparent and predictable cost sharing, and increase the value of federal subsidies.
Because of it, Washingtonians should see lower premiums and lower deductibles than what are being offered today on the exchange, and we can push back against attempts from lawmakers in Washington, D.C. who are trying to limit options nationally for affordable, quality care.
That builds on the bill I signed into law in 2018 that requires all health insurers to cover abortion if they also cover maternity care. It also mandated coverage for every form of birth control, including emergency contraception, without any out-of-pocket costs.
Reproductive health care, including family planning and abortion, is health care. I've always believed that, and it's more important than ever that states do everything they can to support it.
**I've worked so hard in Washington state to protect affordable care and reproductive freedom, and I need you by my side to keep fighting:[Add your name to recommit to the fight to protect affordable, accessible health care, no matter what happens in the Supreme Court.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/protect-our-health-care/?utm_source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&t=6&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/protect-our-health-care/?utm_source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&source=ema_2020-10-26_protecthealthcare_&t=7&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=8202%2E868730%2E45UFQp). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

clean_body: In Washington state, health care will be protected. | Friend, Today, the Senate is voting on whether or not to confirm Supreme Court nominee Amy Coney Barrett. All indications point to her being confirmed -- putting the future of reproductive justice and the Affordable Care Act in serious jeopardy. But what's clear is this: It will come down to state leaders to protect health care, including reproductive freedoms, pre-existing conditions, affordable choice, and more. I've spent my career doing just that, so I'm asking: | In Washington state, we made history last year: Our public option -- a first-in-the-nation public option we call Cascade Care -- will ensure that Washingtonians have high-quality health insurance and an affordable option available across the state of Washington. Starting in 2021, all carriers on the Washington Health Benefit Exchange will be required to offer at least one state-defined "standard plan," which will limit out-of-pocket costs, provide transparent and predictable cost sharing, and increase the value of federal subsidies. Because of it, Washingtonians should see lower premiums and lower deductibles than what are being offered today on the exchange, and we can push back against attempts from lawmakers in Washington, D.C. who are trying to limit options nationally for affordable, quality care. That builds on the bill I signed into law in 2018 that requires all health insurers to cover abortion if they also cover maternity care. It also mandated coverage for every form of birth control, including emergency contraception, without any out-of-pocket costs. Reproductive health care, including family planning and abortion, is health care. I've always believed that, and it's more important than ever that states do everything they can to support it. I've worked so hard in Washington state to protect affordable care and reproductive freedom, and I need you by my side to keep fighting: Very truly yours, Jay

name: Gary Peters
subject: I'll be quick but I need you to read this >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, I'll be quick. For the first time this month, we fell short of our must-hit fundraising goal.
I'm reaching out AGAIN, because **we 're still $71,629 short of our emergency $250,000 goal -- even as McConnell-aligned far-right groups are spending over $25 MILLION to unseat me and flip this seat for Republicans.**
Look, we only have eight days left to win and this is a goal we simply can't afford to miss. So I'm asking: [**Can you please chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to make sure we win in Michigan and win back a Democratic Senate?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6c1/2a380d31/20679e29/f0461f/2142760555/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0Z3BfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201026_mwh4gp_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Governor Kristi Noem
subject: Let’s defeat Nancy Pelosi’s squad!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/244399e5d1a6c39d/2f1094b53d2b3593c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, I’ll cut straight to the chase —we have to win back a GOP majority in the House, and remove Nancy Pelosi and her crew from power. If it were up to them, we’d all be beholden to abig brother style government. We have an opportunity to defeat a far-left radical and flip an important seat RED, and get one step closer to evicting Pelosi from the Speaker’s Office. **Businessman Jim Oberweis is running for office in Illinois’s 14th district, against freshman incumbent Lauren Underwood. Underwood votes with Pelosi 100% of the time and has failed to stand up for the people of her district, as well as all Americans.** She won’t support our brave men and women in law enforcement and has even said that the rioting and looting we’ve seen since last May is “beautiful.” Jim needs our support to defeat Underwood and the Democratic voting machine that is propping her up. clean_body: Peter, I’ll cut straight to the chase —we have to win back a GOP majority in the House, and remove Nancy Pelosi and her crew from power. If it were up to them, we’d all be beholden to abig brother style government. We have an opportunity to defeat a far-left radical and flip an important seat RED, and get one step closer to evicting Pelosi from the Speaker’s Office. Businessman Jim Oberweis is running for office in Illinois’s 14th district, against freshman incumbent Lauren Underwood. Underwood votes with Pelosi 100% of the time and has failed to stand up for the people of her district, as well as all Americans. She won’t support our brave men and women in law enforcement and has even said that the rioting and looting we’ve seen since last May is “beautiful.” Jim needs our support to defeat Underwood and the Democratic voting machine that is propping her up. body:
How can my opponent do this to the people he claims to represent?
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M9o5gwCvfJ5MVRYAykCfQJHoCIjHR7itUEc4b97Ae_Wf1SzF3P-5mqtlnHAVBYm2dUZPiVwRz1wd9ChpnQHJU304X8gZPLB-lvK3Dc_GBUByjWz9epZib-rLWFtVPTCTwkltNdBAgZQ0WbGXpz01c_tRU8QamqEz-OxNLMAD-I3j41kGCz4O1b4X13S_PbRfI2WwXeJeGgBizcOCC9LQ5erk54yHZpf2I35mLRvW6RWFfDiRD2tcfAcEHezfd1DWmDkmpSh2sldLA6luqjtwFD2tqxWv8GSGaLbuQObVY5uXfhAjQH11vA==&c=nmp_Apw93u0La8qS-3wyHOKgDZR9oQVLrLppGNFMVCGyPRf53dypbQ==&ch=qLlM4gRCRk-zHyvly7IOfwUgSqs8O_z_WVwS-wOzQccpYaJ_Bu2cHw==)
---
Friend,
---
Joe Biden told voters that he is going to END our country's thriving oil and gas industry.
---
Texans need our oil and gas industry to put food on the table, support our economy, and receive the dependable, affordable energy that our families rely on.
---
_But if Colin Allred wins this election and remains our representative in Congress, he will take his marching orders from the Biden Administration just as he 's done from Pelosi for the last two years -- and DESTROY Texas' economy._
---
