body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

Hi Peter,

I'm about to prove that a Trump conservative can win in Florida- but I need your help to do it!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg
!

I'll cut right to the point- our race is tied. A dead heat.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

A recent local analysis of the race reveals why it's closing:

“The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues."

Olson said, “This is not personal, but Congressman Soto can be the nicest guy in the world but it doesn’t matter because he doesn’t vote the way I believe people here in Central Florida believe,” Olson said. “He voted with Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC (Ocasio-Cortez), 93% of the time, and I don’t believe that ‘the Squad,’ that the people of Central Florida have that philosophy.”

Soto said his alignment with Pelosi on most House votes reflects his support for an agenda that includes raising wages, expanding access to health care and preserving the environment.

As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. Those contributors include the American Bankers Association, the League of Conservation Voters and Abbott Laboratories.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

This race will revolve around turnout- it's that simple. If we turn out Trump/Olson voters, we will win. If we do not, we will lose.

We have worked hard, and this race is closing fast! People don't want a Pelosi clone who votes with the Squad and is bought off by Swamp lobbyists!

They want a normal guy, a veteran, who has been getting things done for our country for decades!

We have one week. It's all about turnout here. Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

Trump is fighting for Florida, just as I'm fighting for my swing district. Helping me helps him- and we need the help right now!

My district is critical. Trump is overperforming among Hispanic voters. If we win here, we win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg
today? We need TV ads and GOTV expenditures- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iWshHaPdXF6OuRU&b=MGa68V3qvJ2MMHN.RGS8Xg

Bill Olson

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, I'm about to prove that a Trump conservative can win in Florida- but I need your help to do it! My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district ! I'll cut right to the point- our race is tied. A dead heat. Image A recent local analysis of the race reveals why it's closing: “The fact is, I’m a progressive,” Soto said. "I am passionate about progressive issues." Olson said, “This is not personal, but Congressman Soto can be the nicest guy in the world but it doesn’t matter because he doesn’t vote the way I believe people here in Central Florida believe,” Olson said. “He voted with Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC (Ocasio-Cortez), 93% of the time, and I don’t believe that ‘the Squad,’ that the people of Central Florida have that philosophy.” Soto said his alignment with Pelosi on most House votes reflects his support for an agenda that includes raising wages, expanding access to health care and preserving the environment. As of Wednesday, Soto had reported about $744,000 in campaign contributions, with about 71% of that coming from political committees. Those contributors include the American Bankers Association, the League of Conservation Voters and Abbott Laboratories. Image This race will revolve around turnout- it's that simple. If we turn out Trump/Olson voters, we will win. If we do not, we will lose. We have worked hard, and this race is closing fast! Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b8/77d4c309/22155103/2635baf0/3937901583/VEsEBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b8/77d4c309/22155103/2635baf3/3937901583/VEsEBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8b8/77d4c309/22155103/2635baf2/3937901583/VEsEAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

"" I'm in the LEAD and my district could DECIDE the 2020 Presidential race. "" I'm on the brink of unseating a vulnerable GOP Congressman AND scoring a decisive Electoral College victory for Democrats. The GOP is panicking and dark money groups are pummeling me with attack ads. "" | | "" "" Trump is terrified and pulling out all the stops to beat me. He dispatched his own son, Don Jr, to our district to throw rallies, boost enthusiasm and turnout conservative voters. I won't lie, Peter: These schemes led to Trump's victory in 2016, and they could do it again. Our only chance of making their plan BACKFIRE hinges on ramping up our voter outreach immediately. "" | "" "" All eyes are on this race and just a handful of votes could tip the scales. [FiveThirtyEight: NE-02 is a DECIDING FACTOR in the 2020 Presidential race The New York Times: The presidential election could be decided by an unlikely spot: Nebraska's Second Congressional District The Washington Post: Don Bacon admits: "This [NE-02] could be the tie-breaking vote"]( "") "" We cannot take a single vote for granted, especially in these final 8 days. I know that if we act NOW, we can pull this off and deliver a historic victory for Democrats. But only if we have the resources to fight until the bitter end. ""** | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for being in this fight with me, Kara | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, "" Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, "" We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, "" We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support! 7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132 info@eastmanforcongress.com | | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Molly=20Kelly?=
subject: Dan Feltes is the governor Granite Staters deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working for NH Families and Children
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/78d714eaed5b/052219-310766?e=6ad5a2afdb)

,

We are facing one of the most critical elections in our lifetime. Our gubernatorial race right here in New Hampshire will be crucial to getting our state back on track and guaranteeing that every person and every family is prioritized, and not just the governor’s political allies.

I'm proud to support Senator Dan Feltes for governor because he has spent his career looking out for working people and is the best person to ensure that no Granite Stater falls through the cracks.

Will you join me in supporting Dan's race for governor? Chip in $5 or more to help elect Dan to fight for working Granite Staters. (https://mollykelly.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db523bebb6ffbcad7e2109779&id=3721517550&e=6ad5a2afdb)

New Hampshire deserves a leader who values transparency, works across party lines, and who listens. Dan has proven time and again his commitment to working families. From working across the aisle fighting for education funding, clean energy, and voting rights to standing up for families and children as a legal aid attorney, Dan has worked tirelessly to ensure that working people have someone they can count on.

Dan's campaign has momentum. We can defeat Governor Chris Sununu and put working families first again, but only if we step up and have his back in this important fight.

Will you chip in to Dan's campaign right away to help elect him to fight for working families? (https://mollykelly.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db523bebb6ffbcad7e2109779&id=feb44089ca&e=6ad5a2afdb)

Thanks,

Molly

This election in Maine is unlike anything anyone in Maine has ever seen before.
More money has been raised and poured into Maine than nearly any other state in the nation. Our team has been outraised and outspent 5-1, but we are STILL tied in the polls. I know I've asked a lot of you in this campaign, but we're in the homestretch and I need your support now more than ever.

Thanks so much,

name: Martha McSally

disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
I am taking one of the most important votes of my life. We are less than 10 days until Election Day and filling this seat will infuriate the Left and their megadonors. Show we're ready to FILL THIS SEAT and defend the Senate.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001COy9yL7pjUAxL5IOWoP0tmECCQSV0LUJKaAVVq1QA4zJzcXQlEItcQmSQggZNOtdwKmoBg6b6FZybax4ff6rj1i7Mo92DKgEYs1-my_1EF0C2ioht-5SYswDWIfVBnluDJXlm01CevzILG8AlxCasEsfWiuat_qIVe6KlOvD33BAxsfAjn68YoT0MHLkJj_iO0uejOywXFGK7xmyRduKFr5EsoNMmIOTtCHDIVAjYwdUPd_xljkdk3sNV_6JFj0cruCOO_keQ6owghgluiDFsxWDoZifxh8qh40syVC_IWGztAkvSTDifG4EUiGU8w6ZVYXg03m59A2lLKQE48-nvrTad2QkgE3CBMJtG8G_QN492tsu1xAfoZG5WT0v_CPJ_DJN6vOgyAM=&c=VKRh8YHOBzMvmyCdHYw8xweN7F99B3G9hMoGXLXyQSHL3OK7S8CXYQ==&ch=MEYIN0bSxPwMpVHjKlNBrw-C6RYpBxK1jF7XeG_FInPqQ17aS_1WOg==)
Friend,
Today, I am taking one of the most important votes of my life.

I am voting YES, and we are confirming Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court! My opponent said he would vote no.

**Democrats have raised almost $1 BILLION in the last month. As soon as I cast this vote, I will be the focus of attacks at a level we've never seen before.** [**Will you stand with me and help me fight back against the attacks coming my way?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001COy9yL7pjUAxL5IOWoP0tmECCQSV0LUJKaAVVq1QA4zJzcXQlEItcQmSQggZNOtdwKmoBg6b6FZybax4ff6rj1i7Mo92DKgEYs1-my_1EF0C2ioht-5SYswDWIfVBnluDJXlm01CevzILG8AlxCasEsfWiuat_qIVe6KlOvD33BAxsfAjn68YoT0MHLkJj_iO0uejOywXFGK7xmyRduKFr5EsoNMmIOTtCHDIVAjYwdUPd_xljkdk3sNV_6JFj0cruCOO_keQ6owghgluiDFsxWDoZifxh8qh40syVC_IWGztAkvSTDifG4EUiGU8w6ZVYXg03m59A2lLKQE48-nvrTad2QkgE3CBMJtG8G_QN492tsu1xAfoZG5WT0v_CPJ_DJN6vOgyAM=&c=VKRh8YHOBzMvmyCdHYw8xweN7F99B3G9hMoGXLXyQSHL3OK7S8CXYQ==&ch=MEYIN0bSxPwMpVHjKlNBrw-C6RYpBxK1jF7XeG_FInPqQ17aS_1WOg==)

We can't let up. We will succeed in solidifying a conservative majority to the Supreme Court, but you can't forget what's at stake.
* Democrats have smashed fundraising records and my opponent just outraised me by $16 million.
* If the Left wins, they will expand the Supreme Court and pack it with liberal activists.
* Democrats would change the rules to ram through the most radical agenda in American history.

We have less than 8 days until Election Day and filling this seat will infuriate the Left and their megadonors. [**Rush an emergency donation right now and help us fight back!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001COy9yL7pjUAxL5IOWoP0tmECCQSV0LUJKaAVVq1QA4zJzcXQlEItcQmSQggZNOtdwKmoBg6b6FZybax4ff6rj1i7Mo92DKgEYs1-my_1EF0C2ioht-5SYswDWIfVBnluDJXlm01CevzILG8AlxCasEsfWiuat_qIVe6KlOvD33BAxsfAjn68YoT0MHLkJj_iO0uejOywXFGK7xmyRduKFr5EsoNMmIOTtCHDIVAjYwdUPd_xljkdk3sNV_6JFj0cruCOO_keQ6owghgluiDFsxWDoZifxh8qh40syVC_IWGztAkvSTDifG4EUiGU8w6ZVYXg03m59A2lLKQE48-nvrTad2QkgE3CBMJtG8G_QN492tsu1xAfoZG5WT0v_CPJ_DJN6vOgyAM=&c=VKRh8YHOBzMvmyCdHYw8xweN7F99B3G9hMoGXLXyQSHL3OK7S8CXYQ==&ch=MEYIN0bSxPwMpVHjKlNBrw-C6RYpBxK1jF7XeG_FInPqQ17aS_1WOg==)

We are making history today, but our fight does not stop here. If we can't defend Arizona and the Senate, Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats will undo everything we've accomplished.

We need to send a LOUD message to Democrats today. [**Show we 're ready to FILL THIS SEAT and defend the Senate.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001COy9yL7pjUAxL5IOWoP0tmECCQSV0LUJKaAVVq1QA4zJzcXQlEItcQmSQggZNOtdwKmoBg6b6FZybax4ff6rj1i7Mo92DKgEYs1-my_1EF0C2ioht-5SYswDWIfVBnluDJXlm01CevzILG8AlxCasEsfWiuat_qIVe6KlOvD33BAxsfAjn68YoT0MHLkJj_iO0uejOywXFGK7xmyRduKFr5EsoNMmIOTtCHDIVAjYwdUPd_xljkdk3sNV_6JFj0cruCOO_keQ6owghgluiDFsxWDoZifxh8qh40syVC_IWGztAkvSTDifG4EUiGU8w6ZVYXg03m59A2lLKQE48-nvrTad2QkgE3CBMJtG8G_QN492tsu1xAfoZG5WT0v_CPJ_DJN6vOgyAM=&c=VKRh8YHOBzMvmyCdHYw8xweN7F99B3G9hMoGXLXyQSHL3OK7S8CXYQ==&ch=MEYIN0bSxPwMpVHjKlNBrw-C6RYpBxK1jF7XeG_FInPqQ17aS_1WOg==)

Martha McSally

clean_body: I am taking one of the most important votes of my life. We are less than 10 days until Election Day and filling this seat will infuriate the Left and their megadonors. Show we're ready to FILL THIS SEAT and defend the Senate. == Friend, Today, I am taking one of the most important votes of my life. I am voting YES, and we are confirming Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court! My opponent said he would vote no. Democrats have raised almost $1 BILLION in the last month. As soon as I cast this vote, I will be the focus of attacks at a level we've never seen before. == We can't let up. We will succeed in solidifying a conservative majority to the Supreme Court, but you can't forget what's at stake. Democrats have smashed fundraising records and my opponent just outraised me by $16 million. If the Left wins, they will expand the Supreme Court and pack it with liberal activists. * Democrats would change the rules to ram through the most radical agenda in American history. We have less than 8 days until Election Day and filling this seat will infuriate the Left and their megadonors. == We are making history today, but our fight does not stop here. If we can't defend Arizona and the Senate, Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats will undo everything we've accomplished. We need to send a LOUD message to Democrats today. == In Service, Martha McSally == Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc. 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265 PHOENIX, AZ 85032 | | McSally for Senate, Inc. | 5080 NORTH 40TH ST, SUITE 265, Phoenix, AZ 85032 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Georgia - early voting ends Friday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b5c/1515357939/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Over one-third of Georgians have already made their voices heard this election. We are setting records-- and national pundits have taken notice. **Georgia has been ranked the most competitive state in the U.S.** With the whole country watching us, it has never been more important for Georgians to make our voices heard. If you're voting in person, remember that **early in-person voting ends on Friday, October 30**. Make your voting plan today! Find your early voting location and hours at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b5d/1515357939/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com") or by calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). When you head to the polls, make sure to take an[ acceptable form of photo ID](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b5a/1515357939/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you. For more information about making your voting plan and to ensure your vote is counted, visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b5b/1515357939/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). Received your mail ballot? Excellent! Follow the instructions provided to fill it out. Use a **blue or black pen** and **fill in the entire oval** to the left of your preferred candidates! When you're done filling out your ballot, make sure to **sign the oath on the outside of the envelope**. Then, check [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b58/1515357939/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") to see where you can return it, either at a drop box in your county or at your county's elections office. You can also still return your ballot by mail, but we recommend returning it by hand. **Your ballot must be received by your county elections office by 7pm on November 3.** Once you've dropped it off, you can check [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa49f/34a064cc/1a1b304c/7023b59/1515357939/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure your ballot has been received. Join the millions of Georgians making history this week by making your voice heard and casting your ballot early. If you have any questions or need help, call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Thank you for voting, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

subject: Why Amy Coney Barrett's Confirmation Is an Imminent Victory for Court and Country
body:
October 26 promises to be a milestone for the Constitution and the country. Besides being an outstanding jurist, she would give the Supreme Court... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=841e3f2229&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Why Amy Coney Barrett's Confirmation Is an Imminent Victory for Court and Country**

“Sunday, cloture on the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett was invoked by the Senate, which limited debate and enabled that body to hold a confirmation vote for her on Monday night. That's why October 26 promises to be a milestone for the Constitution and the country,” Frank Scaturro and Carrie Severino write for Fox News.

“From the time of his first election four years ago, President Trump promised to appoint justices in the mold of Antonin Scalia and Clarence Thomas, jurists who embrace originalism and textualism. With the nomination of Judge Barrett, he kept that promise.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a42bd094c0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Obama recovery, which was subpar in virtually all respects, ultimately underperformed the Fed’s expectations in terms of GDP growth and the unemployment rate, while the Trump portion of the recovery consistently outperformed expectations,” former Federal Reserve economist Lawrence Lindsey writes for [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=078436e919&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Made in China” products “could be produced by victims of the Chinese government’s heinous detention of 1 to 3 million Uyghurs, Kazakhs, and other Muslim and ethnic minorities . . . The Chinese government needs to close its internment camps, set its captives free, and end its state-sponsored forced labor program immediately,” U.S. immigration officials Ken Cuccinelli and Mark Morgan write for [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b7f142a28&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| According to the White House’s latest Pennsylvania jobs report, “Pennsylvania natural gas helps employ 26,000 workers and supports an additional 330 thousand jobs . . . Since President Trump took office—coal mining jobs in Pennsylvania have increased by more than six percent [and] have been filled by local, American workers,” Dylan Fearon reports for Wilkes-Barre’s [Fox 56 News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0adcb4a829&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

They are attempting to diminish her record and derail her re-election campaign. They think they can buy this seat back.**[It didn 't work in 2018, and we are doing all we can to ensure it doesn't work this year.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GkuRuN2MQotWzErcOJyr9zH_24uGclsK4viCDhIycNk=/pAzwyByxeyy3F-ajcBS2gr5oAMqQjg6N5sqJo_ByP7o=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201026-1-EM&amount=25)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: You’ll be part of a movement unlike any we’ve seen in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
We are almost there.

Eight days left, including today.

While Texas leads the country in number of votes cast and also leads in
improvement over 2016 turnout, there are still millions of Texas voters
who have yet to vote.

In the biggest swing state in the country, one that also happens to be the
most voter-suppressed, we need to do everything we can to turn them out.

The election for the State House, the majority in the U.S. Senate, and the
ability to decide the Presidential election on November 3rd all depend on
Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201026-110478&t=1001&akid=110478%2E444211%2Eoas19i ]Can I count on you to join me at one of these phone banks?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201026-110478&t=1003&akid=110478%2E444211%2Eoas19i ]November 1 - November 3

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201026-110478&t=1004&akid=110478%2E444211%2Eoas19i ]Get more info or RSVP »

You’ll be part of a movement unlike any we’ve seen in Texas. So far this
year volunteers like you have helped us make more than 50 million voter
contact attempts, register nearly 200,000 voters, and helped spur the
largest voter turnout in Texas history.

Let’s finish strong — it’s not enough to break records and overcome voter
suppression if we don’t win these races.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201026-110478&t=1005&akid=110478%2E444211%2Eoas19i ]So join me this week and let’s win Texas.

Beto

subject: Today's vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Confirming Justice Amy Coney Barrett is a big win for our Constitution and everyone in our country. I could not be more proud to cast my vote for Justice Barrett, and I truly believe the best possible candidate filled this vacant seat.

Friend,

Confirming Justice Amy Coney Barrett is a big win for our Constitution and everyone in our country. I could not be more proud to cast my vote for Justice Barrett, and I truly believe the best possible candidate filled this vacant seat.

But, this win will not matter if we lose this election just one week from tomorrow. John Hickenlooper says he's open to the idea of expanding the Supreme Court. Joe Biden says he's going to create a commission that will look into possibilities of packing the court and beyond. Each day, the Left gives us more reasons to keep fighting for our values as they become more radical.

That's why I'm asking for your help tonight. My team is working day and night to reach out to voters, deliver yard signs, and keep our campaign on track. But funds are limited, our budget is quickly running out, and we need a boost. But, this win will not matter if we lose this election just one week from tomorrow. John Hickenlooper says he's open to the idea of expanding the Supreme Court. Joe Biden says he's going to create a commission that will look into possibilities of packing the court and beyond. Each day, the Left gives us more reasons to keep fighting for our values as they become more radical. That's why I'm asking for your help tonight. My team is working day and night to reach out to voters, deliver yard signs, and keep our campaign on track. But funds are limited, our budget is quickly running out, and we need a boost. == == Time is running out, Friend. I need your help. Please, chip in whatever you can, and help us defend our institutions from the radical Left who are aiming to tear them down. Thank you for your continued support, Friend. -Cory == PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE | | Cory Gardner for Senate | PO Box 461798, Aurora, CO 80046 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
Listening to science
|
---

| | Derek --

We know you're getting a lot of emails right now, so we'll keep this short.

**Here's what you need to know:** President Trump just attacked Dr. Fauci.

**Trump called Dr. Fauci a "disaster" and "an idiot," blaming his own mismanagement of the coronavirus pandemic on Dr. Fauci** and claiming that if he had followed Fauci's advice, more Americans would have died. He even went as far as to say that the only reason he hadn't removed Dr. Fauci from the White House Coronavirus task force was because he knew he'd face negative press coverage for doing so.

Then Trump tried to backpedal during the final debate, saying he wasn't "knocking him" -- but we know the truth.

Mark Warner has made his position clear: he's committed to listening to the science and to consulting public health officials and all of the available data when making decisions about the coronavirus pandemic. No backpedaling necessary -- just a consistent, science-based approach. He trusts Dr. Fauci and he will continue to make decisions based on data as we navigate this pandemic.

[**If you want to keep Mark Warner's steady leadership in the Senate, please consider chipping in to his re-election campaign.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da14/53d9897e/55770657/1c88c0e9/2581116129/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201026_f_1_nd__905__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you for your support.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Less than 2 weeks to win back a conservative House majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WESTERMAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's Speaker Newt Gingrich, reaching out on behalf of my friend and trusted conservative leader, Bruce Westerman.

Friend,

It's Speaker Newt Gingrich, reaching out on behalf of my friend and trusted conservative leader, Bruce Westerman.

We are approaching one of the most consequential elections in our nation's history. In less than two short weeks, Americans will be given a clear choice between a free-market and individual responsibility, or socialism and total government control.

Make no mistake about it, our values and way of life are on the ballot on November 3rd. That is why we need to send leaders like Bruce back to Congress so he can continue to advocate for conservative principles and our free-market system.

Bruce is a professional engineer, licensed forester, and knows the importance of proper forest management, which helps prevent wildfires. He is at the forefront of confronting the wildfire issues that have recently plagued our nation. He is a fighter for Arkansans and the issues they care about like health care, protecting the 2nd Amendment, access to public lands and environmental stewardship.

Bruce and our Republican team are working hard to provide pragmatic solutions to the issues Americans are facing every day and to rebuild our great economy. We need your support today and your vote on November 3rd to keep fighting for America. clean_body: It's Speaker Newt Gingrich, reaching out on behalf of my friend and trusted conservative leader, Bruce Westerman. Friend, It's Speaker Newt Gingrich, reaching out on behalf of my friend and trusted conservative leader, Bruce Westerman. We are approaching one of the most consequential elections in our nation's history. In less than two short weeks, Americans will be given a clear choice between a free-market and individual responsibility, or socialism and total government control. Make no mistake about it, our values and way of life are on the ballot on November 3rd. That is why we need to send leaders like Bruce back to Congress so he can continue to advocate for conservative principles and our free-market system. Bruce is a professional engineer, licensed forester, and knows the importance of proper forest management, which helps prevent wildfires. He is at the forefront of confronting the wildfire issues that have recently plagued our nation. He is a fighter for Arkansans and the issues they care about like health care, protecting the 2nd Amendment, access to public lands and environmental stewardship. Bruce and our Republican team are working hard to provide pragmatic solutions to the issues Americans are facing every day and to rebuild our great economy. We need your support today and your vote on November 3rd to keep fighting for America. == == == == == As the former Speaker of the House of Representatives, I know first hand how critical it is for Republicans to take back the House majority so we can get Washington back to work for the American people. == == Thank you for your support of conservatives this November. Best, == Newt Gingrich PAID FOR BY WESTERMAN FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 21097 HOT SPRINGS, AR 71903 == | | WESTERMAN FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 21097, HOT SPRINGS, AR 71903 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806765/258429517/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=&emci=4bccc7e6-ab17-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=462dd207-d517-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=8780864)
Hello,

It's no secret that we are facing a critical moment in this country. This is the time when we need real leaders with conviction and courage in Congress.

[**That's why I was proud to endorse Georgette Gómez for Congress. I'm committed to helping make sure she wins — but I can't do it alone. She's counting on strong grassroots support from this team. If you can, please chip in to her campaign for Congress today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806766/258429518/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=)

You don't have to look far to see all the reasons why we need big, structural change in Washington — and Georgette Gómez is ready to deliver that change.

We see how Donald Trump and his Republican cronies in the Senate wouldn't lift a finger for _months_ to help out working families by passing meaningful coronavirus relief.

We see the effects of the climate crisis — severe storms and raging wildfires hurting vulnerable communities, while Republicans deny climate change and cater to their fossil fuel industry donors.

And now, we see Trump and his Republican enablers racing to steal another Supreme Court seat to gut _Roe v. Wade_ and rip health care away from millions of people _in the middle of a pandemic._

So, here's the urgent question we face: How do we take back our democracy from the hands of this corrupt, morally bankrupt administration this November?

**By electing bold leaders with integrity in Washington who will undo this administration's disastrous policies and fight for the American people — not Washington lobbyists and special interests.** Leaders powered by the grassroots, not the powerful.

Georgette is a leader with the courage and conviction needed to fight for the needs of working families in Congress. **Her proven track record shows her enduring commitment to take necessary action** on climate change, expand affordable housing, protect Social Security and Medicare, prioritize public health, and extend much-needed relief funding for small businesses hurt by COVID-19.

**But first, we need to make sure she wins this race — and grassroots donors like you will make all the difference now that we're in the final days of voting. You can power the outreach that gets this campaign over the finish line.**

[**So, friend, if you're able to, will you support Georgette Gómez and chip in whatever you can to see her through this election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806767/258429519/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806768/258429520/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806769/258429521/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=)
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806770/258429522/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=) | [Express Donate $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806771/258429523/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=)
[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806772/258429524/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806773/258429525/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=)
San Diego needs an advocate like Georgette to fight for working families and communities.

And we need real leaders like Georgette Gómez in Washington to make real change and put power in the hands of the people.

**We're going to do this — side by side.**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806774/258429526/-605652049?refcode=em20_201026_warren1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806775/258429527/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=&emci=4bccc7e6-ab17-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=462dd207-d517-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20806776/258429528/-605652049?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=). We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4bccc7e6-ab17-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0/462dd207-d517-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJkZDIwNy1kNTE3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UjOCrGslJ254Su7-vk2BC3Pndk7dnenpVX04vEWrsM=&id=110960909). name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Fighting for Marylanders' Health Care Rights
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501147753%2501100492%2b-%2b10-26-2020%2beNewsletter%250115528.21147011.4925796.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501147753%2501100492%2b-%2b10-26-2020%2beNewsletter%250115528.21147011.4925796.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **October 26, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
|
| | Since Judge Barrett's nomination was announced, I've heard from many constituents who have reached out to share their healthcare stories. Earlier this month, I [spoke](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fwatch%2flive%2f%3fv%253D837279037097057%2526ref%253Dwatch_permalink%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw3Iu1ryxdP-jM9pjs0vel4I&redir_log=851067710961253) to Jaqueline Beale, a two-time cancer survivor, Xiomara, a six-year old Marylander born with 10 pre-existing conditions, and Elena, her mother. Jaqueline and Elena made one thing very clear during our conversation: they need the Affordable Care Act. This law, while not perfect, has brought them and many other Marylanders peace of mind knowing they won't be denied coverage or charged more because of pre-existing conditions. And the ACA's elimination of annual and lifetime benefit caps keeps Jacqueline and Xiomara from being kicked off their healthcare plans if they incur steep bills.

The stakes have never been higher. With Judge Barrett's rushed confirmation and Mitch McConnell's refusal to allow a vote on a comprehensive COVID-19 relief package, President Trump and Senate Republicans have made their message loud and clear: slashing health care is more important than helping Americans make it through the pandemic. We must do everything we can to provide relief to those struggling and stop this illegitimate process.
---
### Fighting for Emergency Relief Now
President Trump and Senate Republicans have failed again and again to provide desperately needed pandemic relief to the American people. Despite contracting COVID-19 himself earlier this month - and receiving exclusive treatment that few in the world could get - the President continues to ignore the severity of this public health emergency and the resulting economic fallout. His gross indifference during this crisis has had dire consequences: over 224,000 Americans have died, over 12.6 million Americans are out of work, small businesses have been left to suffer, millions of Americans are facing eviction, and funding for expanded COVID-19 testing, contact tracing, and PPE has dried up. This all comes as almost three quarters of our country faces an upward trend in coronavirus cases and as we marked a new daily COVID-19 case record last week. Adding insult to injury, Senator McConnell recently chose to put forward the same wholly inadequate relief bill that Americans rejected a month ago. The McConnell bill is worse than weak. Not only is it missing key relief, but it also seeks to cynically exploit this crisis by giving tax cuts to millionaires, shortchanging schools with strong safety measures, and giving virtual immunity to reckless corporations. It's an insult to families, workers, and businesses who continue to try and weather this storm.

The first HEROES Act passed the House over five months ago but the Senate GOP has refused to act on this robust relief to help Americans who are facing mounting bills. The House since passed a revised version but, that too, has been blocked in the Senate by Mitch McConnell and the GOP. It's time for Senate Republicans to come back to the negotiating table - in good faith - and work with the rest of Congress to pass real relief now. We have a responsibility to deliver on this for the American people.
### Protecting the Affordable Care Act
Republicans have turned their backs on relief negotiations, closing the digital divide, addressing climate change, and reforming our criminal justice and policing systems -- and are instead obsessed with packing the Supreme Court with a right-wing jurist whose record indicates that she would vote to strike down the ACA -- stripping health care from millions. The nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett is the latest step in the GOP's all-out war on the vital protections provided by the Affordable Care Act. She is Donald Trump's torpedo aimed at the health care protections established in the ACA.

Donald Trump promised he would nominate a justice who would strike down the ACA and eliminate a woman's right to reproductive choice. He has found that person in Amy Coney Barrett. The GOP is eager to jam this nomination through an illegitimate process even though 50 million Americans have already cast their ballots. Four years ago, Senate Republicans wouldn't consider a nominee 8 months before an election. Now, they scheduled a confirmation vote just 8 days before. This illegitimate process will mark the first time in American history that a Supreme Court nominee has received a vote on the Senate floor this close to a presidential election. President Trump and Senate Republicans are trying to do through the courts what they failed to do through the democratic process. They've jettisoned precedent and embarked on this charade of a process all while telling the American people that their voices in this election don't matter.

At stake right now - both in the battle before the Supreme Court and in President Trump's nomination of Amy Coney Barrett - is the direct healthcare coverage of over 20 million Americans and critical protections for 133 million with pre-existing conditions. I [spoke out](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1319312978471247873%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw16InY083n-LEGjEZeI0A57&redir_log=970547549061094) about what we have to lose in front of the Capitol Building this week, and [again](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fSenateDems%2fstatus%2f1320614264164487168%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw2SQNGvHAwLiq0Qebc1GWYr&redir_log=280009905661090) on the Senate floor in the middle of the night on Sunday - and will continue to fight in defense of Americans with pre-existing health conditions and the millions more who depend on the ACA. We must use every tool at our disposal to protect healthcare.
### Responding to Emergencies in a Better Way
With Americans focused on the Supreme Court right now, I have been reflecting on the court building's inscription that reads, "Equal Justice under the Law." To attain equal justice we must reform our institutions to eliminate racially discriminatory practices and outcomes. This must be a shared priority for all of us. That's why I've worked with community groups, Baltimore activists, and justice advocates to author new legislation to improve our emergency response capabilities by creating alternatives to police involvement in various situations, especially those encounters where a police response too often leads to unnecessary escalation and unjust killings. Too often police are required to respond to situations that they are neither trained nor equipped to resolve. And too often these situations end in tragedy. This legislation, the [Community-Based Response Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-bass-introduce-new-community-based-crisis-response-legislation%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw13UROXPBQijbLDQgdBjDe6&redir_log=111645076621601), would create community-based systems that dispatch professionals trained in mental and behavioral health or crisis response for those many situations where an alternative to law enforcement is more effective. Building this capacity can both avoid unjust outcomes and provide individuals with the support they need. This legislation is a complement to the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act and an important part of the urgent effort to make structural changes to address systemic racism and stop criminalizing poverty, substance use disorders, and mental health conditions.

I was proud to introduce the Community-Based Response Act with Congressional Black Caucus Chairwoman Karen Bass - and to have worked with so many Maryland and national civil rights and justice organizations to develop this proposal. The legislation has already picked up the support of a number of organizations, and was recently deemed a "priority" for Congress by the [Washington Post Editorial Board](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2fwww.washingtonpost.com%2fopinions%2fsending-armed-police-officers-isnt-the-right-answer-for-every-emergency%2f2020%2f10%2f16%2f606b0cd0-0cae-11eb-b1e8-16b59b92b36d_story.html%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw2LFO1wvhInFTcSgkTyq7Kc&redir_log=63050959871847). It's past time for our country to step up and make changes.

This legislation is just one part of a much larger effort to build a more perfect union - an effort that involves every single American. [I want to hear from you ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%2526cid%253DSenVanHollen%2526crop%253D0000.0000.0000.0000%2526report_id%253D%2526redirect%253Dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%25252fcontact%2526redir_log%253D475918421268285%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw0G7W2_SYmlFQwBfKzvgNf1&redir_log=81105314682128)and hope you will continue to stay engaged. Chris Van Hollen P.S. With Election Day just eight days away, every Marylander should have [all the information they need to cast their ballot](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%2526cid%253DSenVanHollen%2526crop%253D0000.0000.0000.0000%2526report_id%253D%2526redirect%253Dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252felections.maryland.gov%25252f%2526redir_log%253D644688930203218%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw3xgop--PsW20M49SbKLQxh&redir_log=852112494952053). In-person early voting will be held from October 26th through November 2nd at designated Maryland [early voting centers](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2felections.maryland.gov%2felections%2f2020%2f2020_lists.html%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw3U3dR_Ft9qehsUaeaX8j1F&redir_log=305978197381138). For those who are voting-by-mail in this election: mail-in ballots must be postmarked or placed in a [designated Maryland Board of Elections drop box](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15528.21147011.4925796.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.google.com%2furl%3fq%3dhttps%3a%2f%2felections.maryland.gov%2felections%2f2020%2f2020_lists.html%26source%3dgmail-imap%26ust%3d1604336114000000%26usg%3dAOvVaw3U3dR_Ft9qehsUaeaX8j1F&redir_log=305978197381138) by 8pm on November 3, 2020. Don't forget to make your plan to vote!

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | | October 26, 2020 | ---|---|---|--- | | | Since Judge Barrett's nomination was announced, I've heard from many constituents who have reached out to share their healthcare stories. Earlier this month, I to Jaqueline Beale, a two-time cancer survivor, Xiomara, a six-year old Marylander born with 10 pre-existing conditions, and Elena, her mother. Jaqueline and Elena made one thing very clear during our conversation: they need the Affordable Care Act. This law, while not perfect, has brought them and many other Marylanders peace of mind knowing they won't be denied coverage or charged more because of pre-existing conditions. And the ACA's elimination of annual and lifetime benefit caps keeps Jacqueline and Xiomara from being kicked off their healthcare plans if they incur steep bills. The stakes have never been higher. With Judge Barrett's rushed confirmation and Mitch McConnell's refusal to allow a vote on a comprehensive COVID-19 relief package, President Trump and Senate Republicans have made their message loud and clear: slashing health care is more important than helping Americans make it through the pandemic. We must do everything we can to provide relief to those struggling and stop this illegitimate process. Fighting for Emergency Relief Now President Trump and Senate Republicans have failed again and again to provide desperately needed pandemic relief to the American people. Despite contracting COVID-19 himself earlier this month - and receiving exclusive treatment that few in the world could get - the President continues to ignore the severity of this public health emergency and the resulting economic fallout. His gross indifference during this crisis has had dire consequences: over 224,000 Americans have died, over 12.6 million Americans are out of work, small businesses have been left to suffer, millions of Americans are facing eviction, and funding for expanded COVID-19 testing, contact tracing, and PPE has dried up. This all comes as almost three quarters of our country faces an upward trend in coronavirus cases and as we marked a new daily COVID-19 case record last week. Adding insult to injury, Senator McConnell recently chose to put forward the same wholly inadequate relief bill that Americans rejected a month ago. The McConnell bill is worse than weak. Not only is it missing key relief, but it also seeks to cynically exploit this crisis by giving tax cuts to millionaires, shortchanging schools with strong safety measures, and giving virtual immunity to reckless corporations. It's an insult to families, workers, and businesses who continue to try and weather this storm. The first HEROES Act passed the House over five months ago but the Senate GOP has refused to act on this robust relief to help Americans who are facing mounting bills. The House since passed a revised version but, that too, has been blocked in the Senate by Mitch McConnell and the GOP. It's time for Senate Republicans to come back to the negotiating table - in good faith - and work with the rest of Congress to pass real relief now. We have a responsibility to deliver on this for the American people. Protecting the Affordable Care Act Republicans have turned their backs on relief negotiations, closing the digital divide, addressing climate change, and reforming our criminal justice and policing systems -- and are instead obsessed with packing the Supreme Court with a right-wing jurist whose record indicates that she would vote to strike down the ACA -- stripping health care from millions. The nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett is the latest step in the GOP's all-out war on the vital protections provided by the Affordable Care Act. She is Donald Trump's torpedo aimed at the health care protections established in the ACA. Donald Trump promised he would nominate a justice who would strike down the ACA and eliminate a woman's right to reproductive choice. He has found that person in Amy Coney Barrett. The GOP is eager to jam this nomination through an illegitimate process even though 50 million Americans have already cast their ballots. Four years ago, Senate Republicans wouldn't consider a nominee 8 months before an election. Now, they scheduled a confirmation vote just 8 days before. This illegitimate process will mark the first time in American history that a Supreme Court nominee has received a vote on the Senate floor this close to a presidential election. President Trump and Senate Republicans are trying to do through the courts what they failed to do through the democratic process. They've jettisoned precedent and embarked on this charade of a process all while telling the American people that their voices in this election don't matter. At stake right now - both in the battle before the Supreme Court and in President Trump's nomination of Amy Coney Barrett - is the direct healthcare coverage of over 20 million Americans and critical protections for 133 million with pre-existing conditions. I about what we have to lose in front of the Capitol Building this week, and on the Senate floor in the middle of the night on Sunday - and will continue to fight in defense of Americans with pre-existing health conditions and the millions more who depend on the ACA. We must use every tool at our disposal to protect healthcare. Responding to Emergencies in a Better Way With Americans focused on the Supreme Court right now, I have been reflecting on the court building's inscription that reads, "Equal Justice under the Law." To attain equal justice we must reform our institutions to eliminate racially discriminatory practices and outcomes. This must be a shared priority for all of us. That's why I've worked with community groups, Baltimore activists, and justice advocates to author new legislation to improve our emergency response capabilities by creating alternatives to police involvement in various situations, especially those encounters where a police response too often leads to unnecessary escalation and unjust killings. Too often police are required to respond to situations that they are neither trained nor equipped to resolve. And too often these situations end in tragedy. This legislation, the , would create community-based systems that dispatch professionals trained in mental and behavioral health or crisis response for those many situations where an alternative to law enforcement is more effective. Building this capacity can both avoid unjust outcomes and provide individuals with the support they need. This legislation is a complement to the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act and an important part of the urgent effort to make structural changes to address systemic racism and stop criminalizing poverty, substance use disorders, and mental health conditions. I was proud to introduce the Community-Based Response Act with Congressional Black Caucus Chairwoman Karen Bass - and to have worked with so many Maryland and national civil rights and justice organizations to develop this proposal. The legislation has already picked up the support of a number of organizations, and was recently deemed a "priority" for Congress by the . It's past time for our country to step up and make changes. This legislation is just one part of a much larger effort to build a more perfect union - an effort that involves every single American. hope you will continue to stay engaged. Chris Van Hollen P.S. With Election Day just eight days away, every Marylander should have . In-person early voting will be held from October 26th through November 2nd at designated Maryland . For those who are voting-by-mail in this election: mail-in ballots must be postmarked or placed in a by 8pm on November 3, 2020. Don't forget to make your plan to vote! subject: Did You Hear Pat's Exciting Announcement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Vice President Biden and I are counting on your vote. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f6816cdf00&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1ee7381e9a&e=5886ca081d)
---
|

Dear Friend,

Last night I shared the exciting news that Vice President Joe Biden, the Democratic nominee for President of the United States, has endorsed me for Congress in Indiana’s 2nd District.

**_“I am proud to endorse Pat Hackett for Congress. Pat is an attorney, teacher, and small business owner who has been serving the people of Northern Indiana for decades. Pat is committed to education, healthcare, and science to move our nation forward. Now more than ever, we need leaders like Pat in Congress to fight for a better future for Hoosiers and all Americans."_**

---
| [JOIN BIDEN / HARRIS / HACKETT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a215edf7f1&e=5886ca081d "JOIN BIDEN / HARRIS / HACKETT")
---
|
I have a tremendous amount of respect for Vice President Biden, whose character and experience will unite our country in this extraordinarily challenging time. Vice President Biden has a proven track record of leadership, competence, compassion and putting the well-being of others before himself. He is well known for the ability to reach across the aisle in order to improve the lives of all Americans.

Vice President Biden and I share a commitment to ensuring that no matter their background, all Americans deserve a fair shot. Vice President Biden is running for President in order to rebuild the middle class and ensure all Americans are treated with dignity. The Biden/Harris administration is committed to ensuring that every American has access to affordable health care, to "building back better" an economy that works for everyone, and to defeating COVID-19 to save lives and give our country a path forward.

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=08953a8285&e=5886ca081d)
---

[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=362d4d5ef1&e=5886ca081d)
---

[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=987f1134c4&e=5886ca081d)
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

I am very honored to accept the endorsement of Vice President Biden for the 2nd U.S. Congressional District of Indiana. I am particularly grateful, because I know that Joe Biden and I share a commitment to Dignity and Justice for All, not the few.
As a people-powered campaign, [**I need you**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=04f7d04746&e=5886ca081d). Vice President Biden and I are counting on your vote. I also need your financial support to continue messaging through Election Day. [**This is an absolutely critical time to reach as many people in this district as possible.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=520f7571d2&e=5886ca081d) As your next Congresswoman, I look forward to working with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris to bring Dignity and Justice for All.

Gratefully,
Pat

Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

subject: How far will radicals go before stopped?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Later today, the Senate is expected to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. This would be a huge victory for the integrity of our constitution and the court, solidifying a majority of originalist justices that believe the constitution means what it says, not whatever Democrats feel like it means on any given day.

However, several radical ‘Progressive’ lawmakers in Washington have threatened to pack the Supreme Court in retaliation – meaning, if they win enough votes in Congress, they would **force through structural changes **to add more seats to the Supreme Court, and fill them with judges that would do their bidding. **_This cannot be allowed to happen._**
---
| [Don't let it - click here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=d04dd6ce1e&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Don't let it - click here")
---
| The far left that’s pursuing this deliberate strategy to undermine our nation has to be defeated. Recklessly altering the very foundation of our country to suit the political desires of a single party is dangerous, and if they are successful in seizing the courts, they will be free to usher in a radical, unconstitutional policy regime including a Green New Deal and socialization of healthcare.

We need representation in Washington that recognizes this threat and is willing to fight back, not more left wingers that will go along with radical progressives – that’s why I need your help. [I hope you'll consider chipping in $5, $10, or $20 to send someone to Congress that will say **enough** to this radicalization of our government.](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=4b53ea2882&e=d48ad6f8f4)

name: Dean Heller
subject: the most important races in Nevada this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heller Highwater PAC
body:
too critical to sit out
---
Friend -- It's been a while since you have heard from me, but this election is too important for ANY of us to stand by and watch. **Don 't worry, I'm not here to ask you for money! But I am here to ask you to vote and to make sure you know just how important the Nevada Supreme Court race and State Legislative races are for the future of our great state.** First, our state's highest court is critical and I'm asking you NOT to overlook it. **The Nevada Supreme Court race is not one to take lightly.** Judge Doug Herndon needs to win this seat on the Nevada Supreme Court because he has been a judge for 15 years and is the only person in the race with ANY experience as a judge. Judge Herndon has been a top-rated judge for fifteen consecutive years and in 2019, he received the highest performance rating of any District Court Judge. He is the chief judge of the homicide team, has a twenty-two-year relationship with the Rape Crisis Center, and was Chief of the Special Victim's unit. He is the only candidate endorsed by law enforcement and has the experience we need and that YOU deserve on the Court. **The Nevada Supreme Court isn 't all you should be concerned about. ** As you know, the State Legislature has become overrun with special interest progressives more interested in the D.C. "agenda" than what's right for us here at home. They've passed illegal and unconstitutional taxes, moved ballot harvesting from a felony to legal, and chosen pay raises for themselves over teachers. **This election decides whether the liberal majority will have the votes in the State Legislature to raise taxes next year or not. The races you see below will be the deciding factors.** _**See below**_ and make sure you send these around to friends and family and remind them that this isn't just a race for president, but also for what's happening here at home. **Please forward this email and these races along to friends and family and make sure they make them a priority when they vote.** For Nevada and our nation, _Dean Heller_ ****IMPORTANT RACES IN NEVADA**** **_Nevada Supreme Court:_**
* [Judge Doug Hernon](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234862:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)

**_State Senate_** **Protect These Seats:**
* [Heidi Gansert - Senate District 15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234863:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Scott Hammond - Senate District 18](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234864:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)

**Pick-up these seats:**
* [Carrie Buck - Senate District 5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234865:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [April Becker - Senate District 6](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234866:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Josh Dowden - Senate District 11](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234867:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)

**_State Assembly Races:_** **Protect these seats:**
* [Heidi Kasama - Assembly District 2](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234868:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Lisa Krasner - Assembly District 26](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234869:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [PK O'Neill - Assembly District 40 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234870:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)

**Pick up these seats: **
* [Richard McArthur - Assembly District 4 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234871:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Steven DeLisle - Assembly District 29 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234872:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Jill Dickman - Assembly District 31 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234873:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)
* [Andy Matthews - Assembly District 37 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56234874:63RrESbNe:m:1:3057136223:249378C328A7BB3A88DF12B6F606DD03:r)

---
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,
Did you see the Union Leader editorial yesterday? It was titled “Three-card Monte: Democratic sleight of hand” and here’s a couple of excerpts: “In their commentary on the facing page today, state Senators Chuck Morse and Jeb Bradley along with several Republican colleagues stress a basic and important point. It is that **New Hampshire’s low-tax advantages are under serious threat once again.** This time, the Democrats who are dying to impose a broadbased sales or income tax — and thus kill that advantage — insist that their latest plan to do so is not what it in fact is.
Their method of funding a so-called family leave plan is a direct tax on a percentage of a worker’s paycheck. **This is an income tax.** If it’s proponents manage to enact it (over another Chris Sununu veto), it would quickly morph into the garden variety of that levy.”
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTQwNjY4ODU3NjI5MjgzMzQ2JmM9ejVrNSZlPTE5MjgmYj00Mzk1MjEwNDAmZD11M2k3cDFm.iCkbvgWHGu-LLQYc8pwTepWbhUKe8t6vJPb786JdxuU)
---
| |
---
| **This is why Republicans need to re-take the Senate** \- to stop the Democrats and their efforts to bring an income tax to New Hampshire. It’s not too late to help. **Please donate now.**
---

It’s not too late to help. Please donate now. | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by NH Senate Republicans PAC, Chuck Morse, Chairman | | | | P.O. Box 30, Concord, NH 03302 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

name: Roger Misso
subject: Show John Hickenlooper that we have his back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. For this reason, we are proud to endorse a military family member in one of the biggest US Senate races in the country - [John Hickenlooper in Colorado.](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/4UabRXcAt0E1vb-tDwDHB9X4WhMgmilx4qEqQBGNbHE=)

The Hickenlooper family has a long history of honorable military service spanning many generations, and John knows the issues that veterans and their families face. As Governor of Colorado, John oversaw the deployment of thousands of Colorado National Guard and Reserve servicemembers and developed a reputation as one of America's top veteran-friendly chief executives upon their return from overseas.

It is so vitally important that we send John to the Senate to defend the legacy of RBG and save our democracy. John's opponent regularly defends Trump's immorality and destruction of our democratic institutions - including ramming a Supreme Court nominee down our throat with just 8 days before the presidential election. _John must win._

That's why we need **_you._** We want to make sure John has what he needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/4UabRXcAt0E1vb-tDwDHB9X4WhMgmilx4qEqQBGNbHE=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give John a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/4UabRXcAt0E1vb-tDwDHB9X4WhMgmilx4qEqQBGNbHE=)

Thank you for your support! Together, we will flip the Senate and restore decency and courage to Washington.

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/mPqRVjALeXHQs7y706ui_DYCUNFi7sArJq7Fi1bpIqI=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/b-JJGHGyxGGvSPkARIvuoikNcj62a2QyNFPMdtAn1TE=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJlVTR9-QFqslE2DdEbGXaYz6kKFQOg5isnexKLiKw=/JtZDmo1l3IkITrEbNRbIPcrziuxU3L8pHaw3FYN1Uss=).

subject: Join us on Election Night for a virtual celebration!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:

| |
#
Hello, #TeamDani!

We're only 8 days away from Election Day, and we couldn't be more excited about the way this race is trending. We have the momentum in this race thanks to YOU.

When the polls close next Tuesday, we might not all be able to get together to have a traditional Election Night party, but that doesn't mean we can't celebrate together! [Join us for a Virtual Election Night Celebration](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=504a904b4e&e=140a9b81e7)[!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a83425d65e&e=140a9b81e7)

You'll hear from Dani and members of our team as we watch the early results start to come in. We'll get things started at 8 pm CST next Tuesday so mark your calendars, and be sure to join us!

We hope that we see you there, so we can properly thank you for the support you have shown this campaign. Your support has put us in a position to flip this seat from red to blue, and we could not be more grateful.

[Register for the event here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a03d05901e&e=140a9b81e7).

See you on Election Night at 8!

Team Dani

Friend,
---
I kept my word.
---
Last week, I showed up for the debate for Texas' 7th Congressional District.
---
But our current Democrat representative didn't have the courage or respect for her constituents to show up and face questions from the public. _I stood next to an empty chair._
