body:
We only have eight more days to defeat the most dangerous president in modern history, unseat Republicans who enable him across the country, and elect Democrats who know that we need bold reform to ro | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f0/45c30650/1c6207726/66e8a02b/1331411940/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There has never been a more important moment to keep up the fight -- and that's why we're about to ask if you can make a donation to support Warren Democrats.

We only have eight more days to defeat the most dangerous president in modern history, unseat Republicans who enable him across the country, and elect Democrats who know that we need bold reform to root out corruption and put people first.

But even before voting is over, we'll hit another crucial milestone: **Saturday is the final grassroots fundraising deadline of the most important election of our lifetimes.**

We set a big goal for how much we'd need to raise in October to help get out the vote across the country. We can't miss this target if we don't want to have to rethink our get-out-the-vote plans for the last few days of the election.

**[If you're in a place where you can make a donation right now, will you chip in $2 or whatever you can before our final grassroots fundraising deadline? Help elect Warren Democrats across the country, and help make big, structural change.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f0/45c30650/1c6207726/66e8a02a/1331411940/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTNGX0VPTV9MQVVfVF8yMDIwMTAyNl9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW13F_EOM_LAU_T_20201026_V1S3_P")**

By hitting this goal, we'll be able to leave everything on the field -- and do everything we can to organize for Warren Democrats in tight races up and down the ticket.

We don't want to wake up on November 4 thinking that we could have done more to sway this election.

And we won't have to -- as long as we do everything within our power to make sure we win BIG.

That's how we can keep this election out of the courts -- the courts that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have stacked with partisan right-wing extremists.

That's how we can take back the Senate and expand our majority in the House, setting us up to be able to start making real change in January.

That's how we can flip state legislatures, stop Republican gerrymandering in its tracks, and build a bench of local leaders who fight for working people.

**Everything is on the line in the next eight days. Corporate interests and right-wing extremists are staying in the fight all the way to the end -- funding last-minute ads in toss-up races across the country. We can beat them -- but only if we stay in this fight all the way, too.**

**[Please make a donation right now, if you can, to help hit this final goal by the end of the week-- and help turn the page on this dark chapter in our nation's history.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f0/45c30650/1c6207726/66e8a02a/1331411940/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTNGX0VPTV9MQVVfVF8yMDIwMTAyNl9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW13F_EOM_LAU_T_20201026_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f0/45c30650/1c6207726/66e8a02a/1331411940/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMTNGX0VPTV9MQVVfVF8yMDIwMTAyNl9WMVMzX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW13F_EOM_LAU_T_20201026_V1S3_P")

| Friend,
It looks like free speech and freedom of the press are no longer guaranteed in 2020. When a massive report comes out about Twitter's chosen candidate, Joe "Hiden," they bury it and won't allow it on their platform. Censoring the biggest story of the election cycle is unforgivable. We cannot allow this blatant election interference to occur.

| The largest free speech experiment in American history is now engaging election interference for their chosen political candidate, [and now is our chance to step up and fight back](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014FRgSs30zeXMgvF-urnvaTUlfC8zf1vzN7jC4fvlA9sYnJczw4KFI6gwGPx4Mlnsambq-q9eFb9GQSH2hMXgVuLf1SXR44vIqHlrD-Qux0E3n7SiqOgfFqdRunNRsJxlVshtFlxChuDQ5TKHqAx6BVJERmBG77CVyPL72645rBJ1X297s2V6QI-hc0HigJGk&c=kPhCiEEiYS_du956VOMPbUqquXefxOUoY5CbibXMebsG_IaHasR1jw==&ch=JCep8l98V_UPfUlEljpLAPmGvb8aeWpMlMMos0rjDSFvyrseBnm0gA==). We cannot stand by and allow our Bill of Rights to be torn apart by the Democrats and their biggest fans in Silicon Valley.
Hunter Biden has some questions to answer, and we won't let Big Tech get in the way. Speed bumps occur when you're doing the right thing, and we will pursue this to the end. Can we count on your support?

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: Where's Hunter? From: Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Tuesday, October 20, 2020 at 4:57 PM

Patriot,
The Biden campaign and Big Tech are attempting to CENSOR a bombshell of a report coming from The New York Post. In the article, emails from Hunter Biden show corrupt dealings between Burisma, the Ukrainian natural gas company that employed Hunter Biden, and then-VP Joe Biden.
When the story broke, Facebook and Twitter both decided to block users from sharing the story.
We cannot allow this story to be swept under the rug, will you rush in to help us spread the message?

When a massive report comes out about Twitter's chosen candidate, Joe "Hiden," they bury it and won't allow it on their platform. Censoring the biggest story of the election cycle is unforgivable. We cannot allow this blatant election interference to occur. | | | == | The largest free speech experiment in American history is now engaging election interference for their chosen political candidate, ==. We cannot stand by and allow our Bill of Rights to be torn apart by the Democrats and their biggest fans in Silicon Valley. Fellow American,

You’ve heard that my liberal opponent raised more money in three months than any other U.S. Senate candidate in the history of our nation - $57 million.

Well, now he’s broken through another fundraising barrier.

In the first 14 days of October, he raised an additional $22 million, bringing his campaign total to a staggering $109 million!

Here’s what Jaime Harrison won’t dare tell his liberal donors - and what I need to share with you:

**Money won't win this race, but a lack of money could lose it.**
More than 2 million contributions from out-of-state liberals have allowed Harrison to saturate the airwaves here in South Carolina. You can’t turn on the TV or watch a video on the internet without hearing another one of his attack ads.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Chuck Schumer just spent over $100,000 on New Mexico TV to try to save Ben Ray Lujan's campaign. They clearly see our campaign is winning and HOLDING THE LINE for the Republican majority in the US Senate. I need your help NOW to push back. We need to raise another $2,670 to get our ads on TV ASAP. | | | National Democrats should be afraid, because, with your help, we have built a New Mexico powered grassroots campaign while Ben Ray has relied on out of state liberals. | Thank you so much for your support! Mark P.S. Senate Democrats’ Super PAC is rallying out-of-state donors to intervene in our election in support of Ben Ray Lujan. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

| | [](https://act.somospac.%3D%3D/?g=6FsAG_qMaklfgqE9dvMhfTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/somos_persuasion_oct?refcode=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=somosvotantes&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3&source=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3") **Friends, in 2016 more than half of Cuban-Americans in Florida voted for Donald Trump.** This year, winning Florida could depend on making historic inroads within the Cuban-American community. _That 's why we're stepping up and launching a NEW wave of ads targeting Florida Cubans to help Joe Biden win this battleground state in November._ [](https://act.somospac.%3D%3D/?g=6FsAG_qMaklfgqE9dvMhfTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/somos_persuasion_oct?refcode=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=somosvotantes&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3&source=SOM_EM_FR_201026_FloridaRed_U3_X3") This is one of our most challenging projects yet, persuading voters who have historically swung for Republicans -- _but it 's absolutely VITAL to Democrats winning the Sunshine State and BLOCKING Trump's path to the White House._ [**We need your help to get these videos in front of voters. # Sneak Peak Of Our Social Media Ads
Yesterday, I asked you to support my campaign in the final hours before we had to place our ads. Thanks to you, we were able to place ads across the entire state and you'll be seeing them very soon.

I wanted to reach out today to give you a sneak peak of our Facebook advertising that is going live in a few hours.

If you like what you see, we are looking to increase the buys on these ads to reach even more Montanans. Your donation would get these ads even more likes, shares, and comments. Even $20 will make a huge difference. Consider donating today to keep these live.

body:
They’re voting tonight — don’t let the Democrats win!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469838?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-barrett-102620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_barrett_102620&mc_cid=be666936d0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

The Senate is set to vote TONIGHT to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the United States Supreme Court.

And as the Senate is poised to add another constitutional conservative on the Supreme Court, Democrats have made their plans clear.

Democrats will pack the court if they return to power!

We have to make sure that doesn’t happen, and I need your help. We need to make sure that we keep the Senate, and take back the House to end Nancy Pelosi’s rein in the Speaker’s Office.

Will you please chip in what you can right now to help win back the House and FIRE Speaker Pelosi?
FIRE Speaker Pelosi now! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-barrett-102620?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_barrett_102620&mc_cid=be666936d0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

There is so much at stake in 2020 — I know I don’t need to tell you that it’s one of the most important elections in our lifetimes.

But if we all stand together, we can get through this, keep our Senate majority, and WIN BACK THE HOUSE.

Please help, before it’s too late.

- Indiana Republican Party

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: One month
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It might seem far away, but Thanksgiving is November 26 -- one month from today. Unfortunately, cases are continuing to trend in the wrong direction. If we want to be able to celebrate Thanksgiving this year, then we need to act now - cutting back on social gatherings, keeping six feet apart, and wearing our masks with everyone we don't live with. We also need to make our Thanksgiving plan now to ensure we can celebrate safely.
This Thanksgiving, I'm asking you to please keep it local. Traveling means that you'll be seeing people who aren't part of your consistent group, both at your destination and in transit. And if you do travel, you risk being stranded there until December 10. If you get sick while you're there, you can't get back on a plane, and if you test positive, you'll need to isolate there for two weeks.
I know that some people are still going to want to hold an in-person gathering. Again, you absolutely should not, but if you're going to make it your priority, you should avoid social gatherings and non-essential errands for the 14 days before and the 14 days after. This is the best way to avoid catching the virus and spreading it to your loved ones.
I know this is not easy. But this is what we have to do to protect the health and safety of Rhode Islanders. So keep it local and have a Zoom dinner with family and friends. If we want to avoid being in a much worse position over Christmas, let's be thoughtful about how we celebrate Thanksgiving.
---
|
---
| Please start thinking now about what your plans will look like a month from now. Hopefully, you've already prepared to celebrate Halloween safely on Saturday. If you haven't, you can see our recommended guidance [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WDoBXCGULpC3YZ3YXu7rRmCylem8a-S-cONxSwLQlQEEmoBet8cton7Yg0qfp0GHZmHusDZDdv3m3Tx0ZPzpSMrfQmeR9nslYtuwm4YSrMd9o560w-r6uMvYIRNYSetlS66sp1GCAhG8zUY07yZfg07fZOO3IqnMYcJcMFO5lx4R01WSevT5qHC6FDduDpsM2IShwQA6iXz_ksjXENHGU7r6Ki12Y9K&c=LIL_io4RmjB_lfDYPV7VFwp22S1IJrtc4rBPmn1mJpg5oKChxUDwSw==&ch=JpeXiqlYDp82ZSdiXtaV8PjnQc6BpVASK3n0SQp-FC2alGyxxvRshQ==). And if you've got a creative way to celebrate, don't forget to submit your ideas on [back2schoolri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WDoBXCGULpC3YZ3YXu7rRmCylem8a-S-cONxSwLQlQEEmoBet8ctirLK-zlBIXyaO6Jh2WaYq80_A0i9DKVujP74ThQJCqPKxU9lUmjVtFILU83pFt2ZaIeOfQ6GtncjW-ZgX2NY84ha8qvvkj64A==&c=LIL_io4RmjB_lfDYPV7VFwp22S1IJrtc4rBPmn1mJpg5oKChxUDwSw==&ch=JpeXiqlYDp82ZSdiXtaV8PjnQc6BpVASK3n0SQp-FC2alGyxxvRshQ==) by tomorrow, Tuesday, Oct. 27th at 4 p.m. to enter the Safe & Spooky Halloween Contest.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017WDoBXCGULpC3YZ3YXu7rRmCylem8a-S-cONxSwLQlQEEmoBet8cton7Yg0qfp0Goa601o6vX_CGz1t2K-BLn_LGW9NiZhESLv72o_eFeO7ZXqD9eQG9viV-Q9_UD9wK7kBgOV2vPeWWmkldsla6pC1DfKAu3jlAmrIMFjUakGAZur9005p5V2pKsjnxABqzzZFSszPXIE5uHqhgvLJdBsDNMqLvoLvOz4AaRxXoYmFKItEnElM7PtuNAQ-Pbc4eRQIpR7GMmBP3DqB_swyr9sB-g7W2HCfafeJf4YiQg31u5xAkA1c01fo6vf86xJIJrrsR2fNWGeU=&c=LIL_io4RmjB_lfDYPV7VFwp22S1IJrtc4rBPmn1mJpg5oKChxUDwSw==&ch=JpeXiqlYDp82ZSdiXtaV8PjnQc6BpVASK3n0SQp-FC2alGyxxvRshQ==).

name: Roger Misso
subject: They replaced RBG without our consent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Good evening,

I can't believe I'm writing you this E-mail tonight.

Mitch McConnell, in an act of incalculable dishonor that will reverberate across history, rammed a Supreme Court nominee down our throats - just eight days before a presidential election. Republicans in the United States Senate stole a Supreme Court seat and denigrated the legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Health care, a woman's right to choose, voting rights, and marriage equality are all in danger of being forcefully removed in this heinous act.

So let me be brief: we must win. We've got to take back the Senate. At Taking the Hill, we have been working hard to do just that - but we need your help **_now_**.

[**Every dollar you contribute to our Senate slate will be matched up to a full $5,000 for the next 8 days. We have endorsed 11 Senate candidates across the country - veterans and military family members who can win and tilt the balance of power back. We can restore the legacy of RBG and save our democracy, but only if you chip in today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4muw8-NBlpjZEdNrMTs8TjlSgTQ2dABqEjNWFVL7vj0=/M7rqpOktKI3yfrZbkmPessNcv2ZTAAUmdVtj_y3_Z0Q=)

RBG would want us to fight. That is exactly what we will do. Eight more days - it's time to win.

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/4muw8-NBlpjZEdNrMTs8TjlSgTQ2dABqEjNWFVL7vj0=/YVex3mwTuKoFyAvJFIm18Yno2oCzeEwo9MTAghWzycc=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/4muw8-NBlpjZEdNrMTs8TjlSgTQ2dABqEjNWFVL7vj0=/pcSIThGDuXYJQPpaAFxlTUKJg3l9rmWRJ3dKtaB3_ek=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---

Bristol PA 19007 United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
We’re knocking on the door of Congress because of you, and I couldn’t be more excited to represent you in Washington after we win on Election Day. [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=62449c4373a548299190d8d4ea75dbd4&_e=HfmkCxbeh46eWn0-FKnymy7Xy8WqTKJSPpW1jn1Akaijbn_yARN-wrv66FNOum_mQ1KaRucwDFICyKzSOanbLHbWXcdhWaR4yfTmEb9guC-3mhecS-25sdJb5SSSl_WqroFljIhI_ygeGbxyPjJXysVsTKMiQehszkkaDu5i_PiJSDu0nXbEzsP-LxTK5nifvK9Rfw_Ofq7GwRcZY5-uyc93lpJb8h_qNhBSEhdhMWW9e1ALR6jnbrb8PqWu1ecTc0SAt2XBzVe_hgpxEbk_moOru4OSRhlt09V166nl5YRIhfCDzHlbVE6vsnWJUpSUuzY43RlF36TPnVY9c_QZnKEeWzb4WJgfD_rlONKAxMzaDTP1zUlJITSHxx8fnXaT_ApoJe7N1EUjymvDvDbJb9xoJa74OhiBO6KVby9DUYOEKRmA8By0YDgeoZlFsk4QSFpQRVKPiBvA1HfyO0BEWoWjhSyDRwPc5lMWwSfJghE%3D) Well friend, this is it.
**The final push. **
We’re coming up on Election Day, and this week marks our last End of Month fundraising deadline before November 3rd.
We’ve come so far since I launched my campaign, and it’s all thanks to the hard work of small-dollar grassroots donors like you, friend.
Your passion and enthusiasm for restoring leadership that puts the Lowcountry First are unmatched. We’re knocking on the door of Congress because of you, and I couldn’t be more excited to represent you in Washington after we win on Election Day.
**But we can’t give a single inch over the next couple of days — it’s the most important week of my campaign and I need your more support now more than ever. **
Since August, our average email donation is just **[$34.08](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=62449c4373a548299190d8d4ea75dbd4&_e=HfmkCxbeh46eWn0-FKnymy7Xy8WqTKJSPpW1jn1Akaijbn_yARN-wrv66FNOum_m458VkciMWF05cUcHV-vrsTfq4FZwqxhYp1Tz-wZuOrm7uaRK7j3AL3UxGuJq7u_vPEZ0tK2Q_oJUhDV49XDpYRIcnjK8xKx7a4qcdR0nMxxzGNhO7OGUhgEf2C78F_VeF7qFeRPNKGeaFCYRiiPrvkrZluYLcFO9mgQMkiGl6SPzthicsGWkZGkkddOND2rhau12D0na88qjmqbwMbHLe5CprHFXGZuD_qz9sKM3szKI9eNjl-t6OrwjumUdwfVwURn9t2rfgBhsaaQUTkttRWBh0eSlhD5JADqwcjf0m8fyUIaYm59NtdQNCcnr10BIhGfD1ypdc5uwVpjxH3BzEOa4hXBowgjdiCvbIUHrqsFRJiO_MUd3cVavFjmiwdRdPsPhKFqJq5n7s67zoA8A0B8z3u9WFDgE-Fc0A1KwperaNuvijEdA697YhPNkJH59)**. Getting 100 people to match this average would help us compete on the airwaves and spread our message all across the Lowcountry.
_This would be a huge boost for us, and our race is going to come down to the wire. Crushing our End of Month deadline would help us keep our momentum going and turn out voters on Election Day. _
Can I count on you to chip in our average donation and help us reach our End of Month goal?
**Donate here:** **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1649803/avg-amount/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=62449c4373a548299190d8d4ea75dbd4&_e=HfmkCxbeh46eWn0-FKnymy7Xy8WqTKJSPpW1jn1Akaijbn_yARN-wrv66FNOum_mQ1KaRucwDFICyKzSOanbLHbWXcdhWaR4yfTmEb9guC-3mhecS-25sdJb5SSSl_WqroFljIhI_ygeGbxyPjJXysVsTKMiQehszkkaDu5i_PiJSDu0nXbEzsP-LxTK5nifvK9Rfw_Ofq7GwRcZY5-uyc93lpJb8h_qNhBSEhdhMWW9e1ALR6jnbrb8PqWu1ecTc0SAt2XBzVe_hgpxEbk_mvBQ0qeKB_qa1sixggmU_W85ynNsSK5pHtfUzbXo0p4IskfAaXlF4i5sAj-evOBG_mkkmhEM4War7KYdenbRIcuQgN4-73nI9RRTYuu6OhYTUe67Bb8R5UvWWPhWBkDohlZtmxDraytex1T1hPLjue676-KV92Y8r-kapL15I_WZRXTOqowJpQJmdedCfYpdpeVgATnJNHwQv2Ga8GPF8ms%3D)**

Nancy Mace |

We’re coming up on Election Day, and this week marks our last End of Month fundraising deadline before November 3rd. We’ve come so far since I launched my campaign, and it’s all thanks to the hard work of small-dollar grassroots donors like you, friend. Your passion and enthusiasm for restoring leadership that puts the Lowcountry First are unmatched. We’re knocking on the door of Congress because of you, and I couldn’t be more excited to represent you in Washington after we win on Election Day. But we can’t give a single inch over the next couple of days — it’s the most important week of my campaign and I need your more support now more than ever. Since August, our average email donation is just . Getting 100 people to match this average would help us compete on the airwaves and spread our message all across the Lowcountry. This would be a huge boost for us, and our race is going to come down to the wire. Crushing our End of Month deadline would help us keep our momentum going and turn out voters on Election Day. Can I count on you to chip in our average donation and help us reach our End of Month goal? Donate here: Thank you for your support, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: What gives me hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/O7bYI7-TxEVGULlRs8GNa0SVxN_zvApeXn4E1DzKLis=)
Over the weekend, I read an _L.A. Times _article _ _ about Latino voters that filled me with a renewed sense of hope.
As Gustavo Arellano writes, for too long Latinos have been regarded as the "'sleeping giant' of the American electorate." However, President Donald Trump and his anti-immigrant Administration have managed to wake the giant -- and I couldn't be more **proud.**
**[Help me fight back against hateful policies and push for thoughtful immigration reform by making a donation to my re-election campaign>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/YayhFe5kPsqjjzRt8Omx5O1g6JsQ7dNgbHS-mv4hDhY=?refcode=X_102620_LATarticle)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/QoQF1XPVn_jqTlk58qVtpuLcg4YM72IimpsKzFStJHc=?_amp=true)
While the majority of eligible white and Black Americans vote, historically, Latinos have not turned out in the same force.
That is, until _now._
In his article, Arellano writes about a Mexican-American family from Lakewood, CA, that just voted for the first time after living in the United States for nearly _30 years._ I was _so_ excited to see that they even had a Linda Sanchez sign in their front yard! As the daughter of Mexican immigrants, stories like this motivate and inspire me every single day in Congress.
I am **honored** to fight alongside the gente decente who came to this country to make a better life for their families. And, I watch with**pride** as my Latino brothers and sisters use their voices to create positive change in this country -- a country that has all too often sidelined them.
**As long as I represent the people of CA-38, I promise to amplify the voices of our immigrant communities -- but, first, I need to win re-election.**
**[Will you help send me back to Congress on November 3rd, by chipping in anything you can right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/YayhFe5kPsqjjzRt8Omx5O1g6JsQ7dNgbHS-mv4hDhY=?refcode=X_102620_LATarticle)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/363oOZwNIrTYoWbFdxDQf1z4Mco5k9CrvDSsEQsMaaU=?refcode=X_102620_LATarticle)
Glad to have you in this fight,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GXhc1boYH8gxkBez9Z97ygNe9sjpFZaqZ2nX0IKr-Hs=/eZ9huyYgByvsZFuv5OVTR7b_72QagGaKAva68mvX0wU=) _ _

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Tonight’s vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Friends,
Tonight, I voted against the confirmation of Judge Amy Coney Barrett.
By rushing through a nomination just days before an election, in the midst of a deadly pandemic, Mitch McConnell is dragging the Supreme Court down to the decadent level of the Senate, turning it into another politicized body, distrusted – for good reason – by the people it’s meant to serve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
As I said on the Senate floor last night, it’s common these days to observe that our institutions are failing. But institutions don’t fail on their own. They can’t destroy themselves; it takes people to destroy them. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Mitch McConnell will stop at nothing to achieve his goal of grinding our democracy into rubble, and creating an America that serves the wealthy and well connected, leaving working and middle-class families out to dry.
In eight days, however, we have an opportunity to throw Mitch McConnell and his majority out. We have an opportunity to elect Joe Biden president. If we can accomplish these goals, we can stop the institutional rot in the White House and the Senate, and reclaim our democracy to ensure that it works for everyone. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Tonight’s vote shows why we need to retake our Senate majority more than ever before, but I need your help to do that. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Earlier this month, my finance team and I came up with an ambitious goal of raising $70,000 before election day to defeat Mitch McConnell and flip the Senate blue. We’re over halfway to that goal, but time is running out fast. If you’re in a position to give, pitching in $10 or $25 would make a huge difference in our fight. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]CHIP IN $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
CHIP IN $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
CHIP IN $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
CHIP IN $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-october20?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102620_REAC&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000]
Thank you so much for your support. Together, we can retake the Senate from Mitch McConnell and build back our democracy.
Michael
Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!
Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! Will you chip in today to join Michael in the fight for a better tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
DONATE TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse – thank you so much. We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for your support.

Dear Peter,
We are a week away from election day with a few days of early voting left! Get hyped this Tuesday with CONGRESSWOMAN AYANNA PRESSLEY and some of Tennessee's amazing Democratic Candidates at the TNDP MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE RALLY!
MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE RALLY
with Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley
Tuesday, October 27, 2020
7:00 PM CT
Statewide via Zoom
with Special Guests
Andrea Bond Johnson, Candidate TN House 82
Civil Miller Watkins, Candidate TN Senate 26
Brandon Thomas, Candidate TN House 49
Glenn Scruggs, Candidate TN Senate 10
Kiran Sreepada, Candidate for US Congress TN-7
Torrey Harris, Candidate for TN House 90
Marquita Bradshaw, Candidate for US Senate
CLICK HERE TO RSVP [https://tndp.org/pressley/]
No one understands the need for increased voter turnout better than Ayanna Pressley. A dogged advocate for women's healthcare and expanding democracy, she'll bring the excitement, the passion, and the energy to Tennessee that we need right now. RSVP Now! [https://tndp.org/pressley/]
All the best,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Team Oberweis
subject: Have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/53c956e3cecdd51e/28747aa00d45c4abc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, Have you voted yet? There’s a still a week left to cast your ballot early, and we want to make sure every registered Republican makes it to the polls. Thank you if you’ve already cast your ballot. It’s important that we secure every single vote we can, and we know that many people want to avoid heading to the polls on Election Day. If that’s you – and you haven’t voted yet – **[please check out this info and early voting locations and hours and get out to vote ASAP.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/53c956e3cecdd51e/4a360632e6a3f77ec3d6b838967d376c/34533)** There’s only ONE WEEK left to vote early in person in and help Jim defeat radical leftist Lauren Underwood and flip this seat RED! _**Whatever you do, make your plan to vote, either before the clock runs out on early voting or on Election Day. The polls will open from**_ 6:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. on November 3rd. We’re working around the clock to score a big win on Election Day, and every vote matters! Thank you for helping us in this fight. Thank you if you’ve already cast your ballot. It’s important that we secure every single vote we can, and we know that many people want to avoid heading to the polls on Election Day. If that’s you – and you haven’t voted yet – There’s only ONE WEEK left to vote early in person in and help Jim defeat radical leftist Lauren Underwood and flip this seat RED! Whatever you do, make your plan to vote, either before the clock runs out on early voting or on Election Day. The polls will open from 6:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. on November 3rd. name: Mark Warner Campaign HQ
subject: This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Your donation can keep Virginia blue, re-elect Mark, and flip more Congressional districts.
|
---

| | Derek, did you know that with a single donation, you can help

1. Re-elect Mark Warner

2. Elect Joe Biden

3. And boost down-ballot Virginia Democrats running in close races?

All of this can happen if we send Mark Warner back to the Senate with a resounding victory! **[Can you send a donation today to re-elect Mark Warner and flip more districts in the Commonwealth?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da18/53d9897e/55710346/1c88c315/583109913/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ballot?refcode=20201026_f_2_nd__908__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Let us explain more what we're talking about. Here's how this has happened in the past:

When Senator Tim Kaine won re-election in 2018, he won seven out of VA's 11 congressional districts. Democratic congressional candidates also won in those seven districts, but they _fell short_ in the districts that Senator Kaine lost.

We expect this same pattern to repeat itself in the 2020 election. If Mark wins his race by a large enough margin, he can help boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up districts like VA-05, where Dr. Cameron Webb faces an extreme GOP opponent.

Our goal is simple: We're trying to do everything in our power to help Mark win his race, _**so down-ballot Democrats can also win their competitive races.**_

**[Will you help us in this final stretch and make sure we send Mark Warner back to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da18/53d9897e/55710346/1c88c314/583109913/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ballot?refcode=20201026_f_2_nd__908__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Team Warner

name: Sara Gideon
subject: I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to support my campaign for United States Senate. Health care is on the ballot and we cannot lose this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Three years ago, Donald Trump took his first step towards dismantling the Affordable Care Act. With his lawsuit before the Supreme Court, years of relentless efforts by Trump and Senate Republicans to overturn the law could become a reality.
Despite the fact that Republicans have been working to overturn the Affordable Care Act for years, they still have no plan to replace it.
**We simply cannot afford to reelect Susan Collins and let Mitch McConnell remain Majority Leader. There is far too much at stake -- including our health care.**
That's why I'm working as hard as I can to defeat Senator Collins so Democrats can take back the Senate and protect our health care from Republican attacks. But I can't win this race without your help, so I'm asking:
[**Can I count on you to make a contribution to support my campaign for U.S. Senate right now? Mainers are already voting so we are running out of time to win this race. Your immediate donation is much appreciated.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470d/694091970/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Sara Gideon and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470e/694091970/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470f/694091970/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f04708/694091970/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470d/694091970/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Senator Collins' record on the Affordable Care Act is clear:
She's voted twelve times to repeal or chip away at this law that hundreds of thousands of Mainers rely on for coverage, and she's the reason it could be overturned by the Supreme Court next month.
She has voted seven times to repeal protections for people with preexisting conditions.
She has cosponsored two bills to repeal the Affordable Care Act with no replacement plan.
And she wrote a bill that would allow insurers to charge people higher premiums because of their health status.
Look, I've spent the past year and a half visiting communities across Maine to hear what they need from their representatives in Washington -- and in every single place I visited, someone had a story to share with me about health care.
I promise that as Maine's next United States Senator, I will fight to protect Americans' health care from Republican attacks. Because unlike Susan Collins, I believe health care is a fundamental human right -- not something Mitch McConnell can rip away whenever he feels like it.
[**So please, make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can to support my campaign for United States Senate. Health care is on the ballot and we cannot lose this fight.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470d/694091970/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for reading and for working to elect Democrats this November.
All my best,
Sara Gideon
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f0470d/694091970/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyNl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201026_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6d6/2a380d31/205f306f/f04709/694091970/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Concord, NH 03302 United States

Friend,
---
I kept my word.
---
Last week, I showed up for the debate for Texas’ 7th Congressional District.
---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | Friend, I kept my word. Last week, I showed up for the debate for Texas’ 7th Congressional District. But our current Democrat representative didn’t have the courage or respect for her constituents to show up and face questions from the public. I stood next to an empty chair. Lizzie Fletcher is not a representative, but a puppet for Nancy Pelosi. She knows that she can’t answer questions on ending the oil and gas industry or defunding the police, so she’s hiding. Lizzie Fletcher thinks she can hide from voters and still win reelection. Let’s prove her wrong. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. subject: Adam Kinzinger & Amy Coney Barrett

body:
This afternoon, Rep. Adam Kinzinger voiced his support for Amy Coney Barrett. He could have remained silent, but he chose instead to be crystal clear | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c9629f51ff0f/adam-kinzinger-amy-coney-barrett?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
This afternoon, Rep. Adam Kinzinger voiced his support for Amy Coney Barrett.
---
|
---
| He could have remained silent, but he chose instead to be crystal clear in where he stands on the issues Barrett is sure to address.

**Adam Kinzinger opposes Roe v Wade.

Adam Kinzinger opposes the Affordable Care Act. **

And in opposing these two things, Kinzinger opposes equality, he opposes the right to choose, and he opposes healthcare.

Barrett’s confirmation is inevitable, but Kinzinger’s reelection is not. Early voting numbers have us neck-and-neck.

We can defeat Adam Kinzinger, but we can’t do it without your help.[ ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8d865ee232&e=140a9b81e7)**[Make a $25, $50, or $100 donation today](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8cb74e913d&e=140a9b81e7) or [sign up to phonebank on Election Day.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7ed923efb2&e=140a9b81e7) **

I need you.
Dani

| | Friends,
Because New York has traditionally been a "safe blue" seat in presidential elections, cynics have said that your vote doesn’t matter. But this year, I want to explain how voting for Biden/Harris on the Working Families Party line can build progressive power in New York State.
Progressives in New York can make our vote really count this election cycle. You can vote to defeat Trump and build the power of our movement at the same time.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in voting on the Working Families Party line for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. Will you join me in pledging to vote WFP?**](http://tracking.nywfp.org/ls/click?upn=lexgV9SJBgnirUqs-2BO5Cd3VmphWj-2F4E-2B59wHLbcXjAfDGCr6gAZBGxwkv9mVaTp5QCnuKETgyOvELniM4dA-2BGC6VBYMs-2BdmdpA90emRjLyp0hw7z5ny6zuyWFdQ5vjySCtYopUfr6OOEZt8PT2ESVKMS0eRHrvlzulLj7SBmZK0-3DkXLE_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgDMrpwH7WsBtnDLHh-2FOTSdmTcHHD-2BdCsMMmghTpyxmi9iL-2B9SuNUvSbAgPb3P2U-2BZzE7SqdWI4tXeeF572SD0TRRB0vLj5cDDC4MU8NuWvwhdSCIlV-2BFFUsWpH4q2-2F7QNl0afLw5x3wD0CdczcpoVS1hiboAKY0TrZ6rFFZQc7nk1ACn8bhfqRZLcepvOdwERxuA4T0fxbwqGpd54cFRM4-2FU-2Ba1T0wxDfRPoFrrxdSG5KoGW7mE0ml0jFpkenYCIEjUvqugbWcUtbrREdWIE85mbm8KImRkw-2F7g2E2n64zWOO470hjxsFWnKw-2BJBbE-2BOLFhOi31I3D1dslk1mTXmDh8ajEhUhFSbMpTxRNWmy-2FFwti-2F1dZuaCwSOPSchUmqNh02Cy7BPZkCIVlJ5SERPcYzIoIKTzAZuvf-2B9-2FS8OdAk4ty70hqb5HJ7KOlKuOhbsOb-2B5hx6WdBILYfqSFB-2FoGu3AOfGjGQZrdzMkqeC94gEaGsBPKl9gNjDxMSb1p-2BzBiyx3T8hmH1ralEizjQ-2BAMCvnyWlfOwFVbss9xS3-2BJd-2Fdbit6bnhKSyBSt4JjNKiKcMIodXimGVcsll8-2BMb7ickcm16L9nhbcrIpJ-2Bf1xc2TJvC380PCvf73WIKUd62QjyhTVYil8-2FE-2FmEaCPT68H1nvP4QO8SdnizMsYhGv805yJcw6c8wtLi0yHsr-2FihhkDhUzfSzxSNAy7Oai6Qm-2FbyJshHsN0NbNvOjVpb7Q4A6AZENJATeguo2oXbNJJk-2BdKY-2F1jfVvVgqUIezLU1JnzS-2F-2FH-2FgyCh-2FrcQ7XjPO81SQKw8hMnWv2zEM3LW-2B5jRhEzivzQlWbT06YnggssVjK0uU7sk5myjQw4JImQHS-2Fbo5Lw-3D-3D)[](http://tracking.nywfp.org/ls/click?upn=lexgV9SJBgnirUqs-2BO5Cd3VmphWj-2F4E-2B59wHLbcXjAfDGCr6gAZBGxwkv9mVaTp5QCnuKETgyOvELniM4dA-2BGC6VBYMs-2BdmdpA90emRjLyp0hw7z5ny6zuyWFdQ5vjySCtYopUfr6OOEZt8PT2ESVHhBQq5CGw51bLMiJqX0qHHuCg9QN-2Btsgg-2FSnBcpJVQV3Q2jj4OqA-2BtcSKNoZXacZ-2BP2sz-2FO-2FeK6Pq-2FmrkeIt-2FpAeha6Eg9kdX-2FH-2FUD89m2B5Lev9Ors5dUeB71nL7bhF5615pEILwx0USIJtXBFAK2zbga3q-2BinKiR7CKF-2Ft-2Bik8Nk4VJtQ2m5TjXEbtnIBMugm0YCUv6bWp0-2BCtVapkUOEunqflHf7qImG9n1NNeeGw7GFbtzToCeVQsphtb5NCplDeB2XAEHjjblU8e2WiLc-3DRyT0_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgDMrpwH7WsBtnDLHh-2FOTSdmTcHHD-2BdCsMMmghTpyxmi9iL-2B9SuNUvSbAgPb3P2U-2BZzE7SqdWI4tXeeF572SD0TRRB0vLj5cDDC4MU8NuWvwhdSCIlV-2BFFUsWpH4q2-2F7QNl0afLw5x3wD0CdczcpoVS1hiboAKY0TrZ6rFFZQc7nk1ACn8bhfqRZLcepvOdwERxuA It's no secret that the Democratic Party has a diverse coalition with internal debates and disagreements. But these disagreements pale in comparison to the authoritarian and fascist risks posed by a second Trump term. We need everyone to vote — to act in solidarity with the people who are suffering the most in this administration. We need to vote like our democracy depends on it, because it does.
**But in New York, we’re lucky. We have the opportunity to both vote out Trump AND, and the same time, send a message to the Democratic Party that we can do better. We do that by voting Biden/Harris on the WFP line.**
The Working Families Party is a powerful force for working people and progressive candidates— like the landmark tenant protections passed in Albany last year. It never could have happened without WFP, who led the way on defeating the corporate Democrats in the State Senate who stood with landlords over tenants, and replacing them with progressive champions.
This year, WFP helped platform and elect even more progressive leaders, including supporting the ground-shifting successful campaign of Jamaal Bowman and dozens of other progressives to local office.
But every time the people stand up to the powerful, the powerful fight back. And powerful corporate forces opposing progressive gains have secured restrictive ballot access laws, which will require more than triple the number of votes the WFP needs to survive ballot status.
We need to keep the momentum growing. We need a strong movement here in New York in order to make the Empire State a progressive model for the nation. So here in New York we can tax the billionaires, fund our schools and guarantee healthcare for all.
And for that, we need a strong WFP.
That’s why I’ll be proudly casting my vote on the WFP ballot line for Biden and Harris — and I hope you will too.**
**[**Will you join me in voting WFP?**](http://tracking.nywfp.org/ls/click?upn=lexgV9SJBgnirUqs-2BO5Cd3VmphWj-2F4E-2B59wHLbcXjAfDGCr6gAZBGxwkv9mVaTp5QCnuKETgyOvELniM4dA-2BGC6VBYMs-2BdmdpA90emRjLyp0hw7z5ny6zuyWFdQ5vjySCtYopUfr6OOEZt8PT2ESVKMS0eRHrvlzulLj7SBmZK0-3DDeHt_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgDMrpwH7WsBtnDLHh-2FOTSdmTcHHD-2BdCsMMmghTpyxmi9iL-2B9SuNUvSbAgPb3P2U-2BZzE7SqdWI4tXeeF572SD0TRRB0vLj5cDDC4MU8NuWvwhdSCIlV-2BFFUsWpH4q2-2F7QNl0afLw5x3wD0CdczcpoVS1hiboAKY0TrZ6rFFZQc7nk1ACn8bhfqRZLcepvOdwERxuA4T0fxbwqGpd54cFRM4-2FU-2Ba1T0wxDfRPoFrrxdSG5KoGW7mE0ml0jFpkenYCIEjUvqugbWcUtbrREdWIE85mbm8KImRkw-2F7g2E2n64zWOO470hjxsFWnKw-2BJBbE-2BOLFhOi31I3D1dslk1mTXmDh8ajEhUhFSbMpTxRNWmy-2FFwti-2F1dZuaCwSOPSchUmqNh02Cy7BPZkCIVlJ5SERPcYzIoIKTzAZuvf-2B9-2FS8OdAk4ty70hqb5HJ7KOlKuOhbsOb-2B5hx6WdBILYfqSFB-2FoGu3AOfGjGQZrdzMkqeC94gEaGsBPKl9gNjDxMSb1p-2BzBiyx3T8hmH1ralEizjQ-2BAMCvnyWlfOwFVbss9xS3-2BJd-2Fdbit6bnhKSyBSt4JjNKiKcMIodXimGVcsll8-2BMb7ickcm16L9nhbcrIpJ-2Bf1xc2TJvC380PCvf73WIKUd62QjyhTVYil8-2FE-2FmEaCPT68H1nvP4QO8SdnizMsYhGv805yJcw6c8wtLi0yHsr-2FihhkDgfABy0PKTZK8Q8l3D4u5ZV93hGIykauoeuGtwKbsvRu-2FIGYXUqbWYllKWQ6tVo5zZd8BNBwOMZPxbWMWb6GQXigOqV5RydIVZ8L-2F2vbDuoX7CnCQTHh8-2BpQ97n11zAw3YNARX3iw1xFgigerwBj0qc056CQggUW19bVnNa9scEXw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Because New York has traditionally been a "safe blue" seat in presidential elections, cynics have said that your vote doesn’t matter. But this year, I want to explain how voting for Biden/Harris on the Working Families Party line can build progressive power in New York State. Progressives in New York can make our vote really count this election cycle. You can vote to defeat Trump and build the power of our movement at the same time. | "Pledge to Vote WFP >>" It's no secret that the Democratic Party has a diverse coalition with internal debates and disagreements. But these disagreements pale in comparison to the authoritarian and fascist risks posed by a second Trump term. We need everyone to vote — to act in solidarity with the people who are suffering the most in this administration. We need to vote like our democracy depends on it, because it does. But in New York, we’re lucky. We have the opportunity to both vote out Trump AND, and the same time, send a message to the Democratic Party that we can do better. We do that by voting Biden/Harris on the WFP line. The Working Families Party is a powerful force for working people and progressive candidates— like the landmark tenant protections passed in Albany last year. It never could have happened without WFP, who led the way on defeating the corporate Democrats in the State Senate who stood with landlords over tenants, and replacing them with progressive champions. This year, WFP helped platform and elect even more progressive leaders, including supporting the ground-shifting successful campaign of Jamaal Bowman and dozens of other progressives to local office. But every time the people stand up to the powerful, the powerful fight back. And powerful corporate forces opposing progressive gains have secured restrictive ballot access laws, which will require more than triple the number of votes the WFP needs to survive ballot status. We need to keep the momentum growing. We need a strong movement here in New York in order to make the Empire State a progressive model for the nation. So here in New York we can tax the billionaires, fund our schools and guarantee healthcare for all. And for that, we need a strong WFP. That’s why I’ll be proudly casting my vote on the WFP ballot line for Biden and Harris — and I hope you will too. Pa’lante AOC | "Pledge to Vote WFP >>" | | | You are receiving this email as a supporter of Zephyr Teachout and New York Progressives. If you no longer wish to receive emails from WFP, click here to at any time. Paid for by the New York State Committee of the Working Families Party. 81 Prospect St Brooklyn New York 11201 United States of America

Friend,

_We’re in a full-court press until Election Day. _

**What does that mean? It means we need every single Hoosier who wants to keep building One Indiana for All to go all-in for Governor Holcomb from today through November 3rd.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7d0355734daa41a99281cb158838fc63&_e=y2FnTbQUgXXeyVQ4dNgpGEawioDvNqpjsWSreZyL92-AU6qTCLKw0uNk1ZCVvcJGJQhaoXpIaUaMPZ-buQEQzj3x2lZf2m14cg_XNxwUnPwjjtrAuH6dbo2iqltG2aVUQBHtUTgAON9o6onsGq1d8mAeubQSyAO3BtWNjuUsQ1T1Ts6nnC3p3lb2FygFsCc0i9C6FKubiQ4ruL69Bwkum3uuUa6nNeopi3Eg3J2UFEdDr78eFj1T034-VJina6YqG-MXVJU-GdWV9QC0hfCMsxoRPDw41lSh5--xxPjLyzWoYxvRTt3cmD-XHLe4oBXgLMUfWXAqH8nVPo5d3AJwl5nOkXjD466kAk8ENEC0sBkiAtuwXb8ludvDKSZEIIE7FsY3pOyLO8Hx0nsG7qUUiwxweAjfUdSSaZPZ-D-Ensx7p9HxWigQmiYqKhxVTLiSMGw-5Cyd-o06zJAvqnFu5N0YHaoRAVPRIpome6k-eyk%3D)
Friend, the stakes are high in 2020 and we need experienced, steady leadership more than ever.

We can’t take anything for granted and we need to push hard in the final sprint to Election Day. Building One Indiana for All isn’t going to be easy — it’s going to take all of us, working together to create a brighter and better future for our state.

Re-electing Eric is the first step toward reaching the goal of One Indiana for All.

Eric made it clear during the first debate that he’s the right choice to lead Indiana into the future, and he’s set to do it again tomorrow. But he can’t win this thing without your help, friend.

Can we count on you to chip in any amount below to help us finish strong?

Patriot,

**President Trump just voted for _me_** ... selecting “Republican down the line,” including me as his future Congresswoman.

[**Check out the video:**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-399458-939943-5264300-3bd47183ae-3ec5d9b092)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-399458-939943-5264300-3bd47183ae-3ec5d9b092)

Laura Loomer

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: ICYMI: Wesley Joins Fox To Discuss Protecting Houston Energy Jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**ICYMI: Wesley Joins Fox To Discuss Protecting Houston Energy Jobs**

Houston, TX - On Saturday, Wesley Hunt, combat veteran and Houston native running to represent Texas' 7th Congressional District, joined Fox & Friends to discuss the dangerous consequences of Joe Biden's plan to end the oil and gas industry. If Biden's vision of eradicating the oil and gas industry by the year 2035 is brought to fruition, the cost to Texas families will be devastating. The role of the representative of the 7th District, which encompasses Houston's Energy Corridor, must be to stand between our energy workers and the destructive policies stemming from Washington. Wesley Hunt is the only candidate on the ballot who is up to the task.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7f91b148e4394ca98e932a590b8d2ced&_e=7bmRB3qbRheYGIWBM6e0ZmlCQIwP42YR7lrOiP00pXZAiVPGpIBVEN4uQqAXPvya4PvHiorrIHlbF_WRkIg-QQXuFtPSFCCbyJ8dstffY-YT4OtPTFQuOLs5oQx89fAb-O1z6gq1k7AzDG5Aj03wXSPJRrivlYYk45FebBQ1r8VbCdwHKb09YrrTOnBy00X8I4jS-6XaTdl2nKRk6ESwMKb6kVt9i832TpZ7EHUXBA75De5gU1kIlsEN_JIDlPU8qfVMoLaQ0fSUOMd4pZa98qOxi5dQhAjcPkCTX4rneEI%3D)

_"Last week, Joe Biden confirmed his plan to eliminate Houston's oil and gas industry within 15 years. And unfortunately, our current Congresswoman will do nothing to stop it,"_ **said Hunt.** _"Houston needs an advocate who will fight for our oil and gas industry and the millions of Texas families it supports. This isn't about politics; it's about preserving the industry that enables hundreds of thousands of Houstonians to put food on the table for their families and defending the source of our Nation's energy independence. Through their hard work, Houston energy workers have brought our energy industry to unprecedented levels of affordability and efficiency, improving reliability while reducing our emissions. Unfortunately, politically-motivated Democrats are trying to mandate this critical industry out of existence, and my opponent's record of siding 99% with Nancy Pelosi shows us that she won't do anything to stop them. In fact, her only real action on the matter has been to give Joe Biden her unwavering support. Houston deserves better, and in Congress, I'll be a tireless advocate for our industry."_
Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7f91b148e4394ca98e932a590b8d2ced&_e=7bmRB3qbRheYGIWBM6e0Zgkhr9QTTgSWXa0JO0_DwAyyY3zBPPVrjtofv-WneP-j7uxWvalWmC3pmNILF7vn11NGl8-M1MJ4VTrB5giYDel368R7WY4AjgNUlHFhzKybLU4VR7MPzdt142x-1YWZfJngWgDMUNj0Th74OI7igOpEhczXJsFg67RGV9Xhkv_QgMwyy5WCpnyI9DWXFDTCvn8nhMkhq4L8dSEN125Z84r9EtaKL-hx-zeVYB_XYpnzTGVbMa2nf9lasGLjIwy9w8iOSAHlCjbO7hd6mBBVVAk%3D)****

clean_body: ICYMI: Wesley Joins Fox To Discuss Protecting Houston Energy Jobs Houston, TX - On Saturday, Wesley Hunt, combat veteran and Houston native running to represent Texas' 7th Congressional District, joined Fox & Friends to discuss the dangerous consequences of Joe Biden's plan to end the oil and gas industry. If Biden's vision of eradicating the oil and gas industry by the year 2035 is brought to fruition, the cost to Texas families will be devastating. The role of the representative of the 7th District, which encompasses Houston's Energy Corridor, must be to stand between our energy workers and the destructive policies stemming from Washington. Wesley Hunt is the only candidate on the ballot who is up to the task. "Last week, Joe Biden confirmed his plan to eliminate Houston's oil and gas industry within 15 years. And unfortunately, our current Congresswoman will do nothing to stop it," said Hunt. "Houston needs an advocate who will fight for our oil and gas industry and the millions of Texas families it supports. This isn't about politics; it's about preserving the industry that enables hundreds of thousands of Houstonians to put food on the table for their families and defending the source of our Nation's energy independence. Through their hard work, Houston energy workers have brought our energy industry to unprecedented levels of affordability and efficiency, improving reliability while reducing our emissions. Unfortunately, politically-motivated Democrats are trying to mandate this critical industry out of existence, and my opponent's record of siding 99% with Nancy Pelosi shows us that she won't do anything to stop them. In fact, her only real action on the matter has been to give Joe Biden her unwavering support. Houston deserves better, and in Congress, I'll be a tireless advocate for our industry." Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District. **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress.
